papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出统一生成模型AnyEnhance，单模型实现去噪、去混响、去削波、超分辨率和目标说话人提取，创新引入提示引导和自批评机制，性能优异，与语音增强和分离方向高度相关，工作扎实，具有成为生成式语音处理基线的潜力。

chinese_summary.problem: 提出一个统一的生成式语音增强模型，能够同时处理多种任务（去噪、去混响、去削波、超分辨率、目标说话人提取），并利用参考音频提升性能。
chinese_summary.method: 基于掩码生成模型，引入prompt-guidance机制实现上下文学习，使模型能直接接受参考说话人音色以增强性能或完成目标说话人提取；引入self-critic机制，通过迭代自评估和精炼提高生成质量。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 将多类语音增强任务统一到一个生成模型中，无需微调即可完成所有任务；2) 提出prompt-guidance机制，使生成模型在推理时通过参考音频实现目标说话人提取，无需改变架构；3) 在掩码生成模型中引入self-critic机制，迭代改进输出质量。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要仅提及大量实验表明在多种增强任务上主客观指标均优于现有方法，但未给出具体数值或对比细节，证据有限。
chinese_summary.limitations: 目标说话人提取性能未单独详述，缺乏与专用提取模型的深入对比；统一模型在特定任务上可能受限于模型容量；prompt-guidance机制的具体实现方式及鲁棒性需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文明确包含目标说话人提取任务，通过参考音色引导实现，与研究方向关键词‘target speaker extraction’直接匹配。但论文以通用增强框架为主，目标说话人提取仅为其中一个应用示例，并非核心焦点，因此相关性较低。

papers.title: ReGen: Hierarchical Multi-Prompt Representation Generation for Efficient Waveform Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Representation alignment (REPA) has been investigated to accelerate diffusion training, but we observe that regularizing intermediate representations in diffusion Transformers (DiT) may implicitly entangle latents and limit generative capacity. To address this issue, we propose ReGen, a hierarchical multi-prompt representation generation framework that jointly estimates multiple vector fields for both representations and data within a single diffusion model. We further introduce generalized flow matching (GFM) to improve the generalization of conditional flow matching (CFM). We validate ReGen on single-stage waveform diffusion models including neural audio codec and Wave-VAE. ReGen significantly improves waveform generation quality from highly compressed latent representations at 12.5 Hz. We also present ReGenVoice, a latent diffusion model (LDM)-based text-to-speech model that achieves strong speech intelligibility (WER) and speaker similarity (SIM) with a small dataset. Moreover, operating the LDM at 6.25 Hz with rich semantic and acoustic latent representation enables efficient training and sampling, requiring only 1 day of training on 4 GPUs and fast inference with an RTF of 0.08. Audio samples are available at https://regenvoice.github.io/demo/.
papers.justification: 该工作提出层次多提示表示生成框架ReGen及广义流匹配，有效提升波形扩散模型的训练与采样效率，并在低比特率音频编解码和TTS中取得优异表现，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关且质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 在扩散变换器（DiT）中，中间表示正则化可能隐式纠缠潜在变量，限制生成能力；现有波形扩散模型在高压缩低帧率（如12.5 Hz或6.25 Hz）条件下生成质量不足，训练与推理效率有待提升。
chinese_summary.method: 提出ReGen框架，在单一扩散模型中联合估计表示向量场和数据向量场，通过层次化多提示表示生成缓解表示纠缠；引入广义流匹配（GFM）提升条件流匹配（CFM）的泛化性。在神经音频编解码器和Wave-VAE上验证，并构建ReGenVoice，一种基于潜在扩散模型（LDM）的文本到语音模型，利用6.25 Hz的语义和声学潜在表示实现高效训练与推理。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 发现REPA正则化会隐式纠缠潜在变量，提出层次化多提示生成避免该问题；2) 将表示生成与数据生成统一在同一个扩散模型中，同时估计两个向量场；3) 提出广义流匹配（GFM）作为条件流匹配的泛化改进。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在单阶段波形扩散模型（神经音频编解码器、Wave-VAE）上显著提升12.5 Hz压缩表示的波形生成质量；ReGenVoice在小数据集上即实现强语音可懂度（WER）和说话人相似度（SIM）；LDM在6.25 Hz下训练仅需4 GPU训练1天，推理实时率0.08。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未看到对语音增强或前端处理任务的直接实验，可能局限于生成类任务；泛化到其他音频域或更大规模数据的效果需进一步确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: arXiv分类包含eess.AS和eess.SP，但论文聚焦于波形生成（编解码、TTS）而非语音增强或前端处理，缺乏去噪、去混响、回声消除等关键词和任务场景，直接相关性低，仅扩散模型训练技巧可能迁移，但需人工复核是否适用于语音增强类模型。

papers.title: Multi-Channel Speech Separation Using Spatially Selective Deep Non-Linear Filters
papers.summary: In a multi-channel separation task with multiple speakers, we aim to recover all individual speech signals from the mixture. In contrast to single-channel approaches, which rely on the different spectro-temporal characteristics of the speech signals, multi-channel approaches should additionally utilize the different spatial locations of the sources for a more powerful separation especially when the number of sources increases. To enhance the spatial processing in a multi-channel source separation scenario, in this work, we propose a deep neural network (DNN) based spatially selective filter (SSF) that can be spatially steered to extract the speaker of interest by initializing a recurrent neural network layer with the target direction. We compare the proposed SSF with a common end-to-end direct separation (DS) approach trained using utterance-wise permutation invariant training (PIT), which only implicitly learns to perform spatial filtering. We show that the SSF has a clear advantage over a DS approach with the same underlying network architecture when there are more than two speakers in the mixture, which can be attributed to a better use of the spatial information. Furthermore, we find that the SSF generalizes much better to additional noise sources that were not seen during training and to scenarios with speakers positioned at a similar angle.
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出空间选择性深度非线性滤波器，通过目标方向引导RNN进行多通道语音分离，在多说话人场景下优于直接分离方法，与语音分离和麦克风阵列方向高度相关，质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 在多说话人混合的多通道语音分离中，现有端到端直接分离方法未能显式利用空间位置信息，导致当说话人数量增加时分离性能受限。
chinese_summary.method: 提出基于深度神经网络的空间选择性滤波器（SSF），通过将目标方向信息作为RNN层的初始状态，实现对特定方向说话人的空间转向与提取；整体系统可联合训练，并与使用话语级置换不变训练（PIT）的直接分离模型相对比。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出可显式利用空间信息的选择性滤波结构，将目标方向编码为网络初始化参数实现可转向提取，而非依赖隐式学习空间线索；相比直接分离模型，该设计在多于两个说话人时体现明显性能提升，并展现出对未见噪声源与相近角度干扰的更强泛化能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中提及与基于PIT的端到端直接分离方法进行了对比实验，结果显示SSF在混合说话人超过两人时具有清晰优势，且在遇到未在训练中出现的噪声源以及说话人角度接近的场景下，泛化表现更优。具体指标数值未给出。
chinese_summary.limitations: 性能依赖目标方向的准确先验；方法仅适用于多通道配置；网络架构细节、训练数据及具体分离指标需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及语音分离与目标说话人提取场景，使用置换不变训练（PIT）与深度网络，匹配研究方向关键词‘speech separation’、‘source separation’、‘permutation invariant training’及‘target speaker extraction’。但论文核心为多通道空间选择性滤波，与主流单通道时频或时域分离方法存在差异，需人工复核其对当前研究的参考价值。

papers.title: Av-Sepformer: Cross-Attention Sepformer for Audio-Visual Target Speaker Extraction
papers.summary: Visual information can serve as an effective cue for target speaker extraction (TSE) and is vital to improving extraction performance. In this paper, we propose AV-SepFormer, a SepFormer-based attention dual-scale model that utilizes cross- and self-attention to fuse and model features from audio and visual. AV-SepFormer splits the audio feature into a number of chunks, equivalent to the length of the visual feature. Then self- and cross-attention are employed to model the multi-modal features. Furthermore, we use a novel 2D positional encoding, that introduces the positional information between and within chunks and provides significant gains over the traditional positional encoding. Our model has two key advantages: the time granularity of audio chunked feature is synchronized to the visual feature, which alleviates the harm caused by the inconsistency of audio and video sampling rate; by combining self- and cross-attention, feature fusion and speech extraction processes are unified within an attention paradigm. The experimental results show that AV-SepFormer significantly outperforms other existing methods.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出视听目标说话人提取的AV-SepFormer，利用交叉注意力融合音视频特征，与语音分离方向高度相关，方法新颖且性能显著提升，质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在音频-视觉目标说话人提取中，有效融合异步的视听特征，并缓解音频与视频采样率不一致导致的特征不匹配问题。
chinese_summary.method: 基于SepFormer构建双尺度注意力的AV-SepFormer模型，将音频特征均匀分块，与视觉特征在时间维度对齐；利用自注意力和跨注意力交替建模多模态特征交互，实现特征融合与语音提取的统一；引入二维位置编码，分别对块内与块间位置进行建模。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出音频分块与视觉特征时间同步的策略，直接解决视听采样率不一致对特征对齐的干扰；在一个注意力范式内统一特征融合与目标说话人提取，避免了多阶段流水线；设计2D位置编码，同时捕捉块级和帧级时序关系，显著提升模型性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要仅提及“experimental results show that AV-SepFormer significantly outperforms other existing methods”，但未给出具体数据集、评价指标或对比方法的细节，可核验证据不足，具体提升幅度需阅读全文。
chinese_summary.limitations: 依赖视觉模态，不适用于纯音频或无视觉信号的场景；计算复杂度与跨模态注意力机制的开销未提及；实验对比的公平性和泛化能力需全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 该论文属于目标说话人提取（target speaker extraction），与研究方向中的核心关键词精确匹配，但引入了视觉信息，与我方侧重纯音频分离/提取的设定不完全一致；匹配主要集中在任务名称上，方法层面（视觉融合）可能超出当前研究范围，需要人工复核以决定是否纳入参考。

papers.title: MossFormer2: Combining Transformer and RNN-Free Recurrent Network for Enhanced Time-Domain Monaural Speech Separation
papers.summary: Our previously proposed MossFormer has achieved promising performance in monaural speech separation. However, it predominantly adopts a self-attention-based MossFormer module, which tends to emphasize longer-range, coarser-scale dependencies, with a deficiency in effectively modelling finer-scale recurrent patterns. In this paper, we introduce a novel hybrid model that provides the capabilities to model both long-range, coarse-scale dependencies and fine-scale recurrent patterns by integrating a recurrent module into the MossFormer framework. Instead of applying the recurrent neural networks (RNNs) that use traditional recurrent connections, we present a recurrent module based on a feedforward sequential memory network (FSMN), which is considered "RNN-free" recurrent network due to the ability to capture recurrent patterns without using recurrent connections. Our recurrent module mainly comprises an enhanced dilated FSMN block by using gated convolutional units (GCU) and dense connections. In addition, a bottleneck layer and an output layer are also added for controlling information flow. The recurrent module relies on linear projections and convolutions for seamless, parallel processing of the entire sequence. The integrated MossFormer2 hybrid model demonstrates remarkable enhancements over MossFormer and surpasses other state-of-the-art methods in WSJ0-2/3mix, Libri2Mix, and WHAM!/WHAMR! benchmarks.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出结合Transformer与FSMN的MossFormer2，针对单通道语音分离，在多个基准上超越SOTA，与语音分离方向高度相关，方法新颖有效，但非奠基性必读经典。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在时域单声道语音分离中同时有效建模长程粗粒度依赖和细粒度循环模式，以弥补原MossFormer模型对细粒度循环模式捕获不足的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出MossFormer2混合模型，将基于前馈序列记忆网络（FSMN）的循环模块集成到MossFormer框架中。该循环模块采用增强的扩张FSMN块，结合门控卷积单元（GCU）和密集连接来捕捉循环模式，并通过瓶颈层和输出层控制信息流，实现无循环连接的并行处理。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次将“无RNN”的循环模块与Transformer架构融合于语音分离，同时捕获长程依赖和细粒度循环模式。2) 设计的循环模块利用扩张FSMN、GCU和密集连接，无需显式循环连接即可高效建模时序规律。3) 在多个基准数据上验证了该混合模型的显著性能提升。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在WSJ0-2/3mix、Libri2Mix和WHAM!/WHAMR!基准上，MossFormer2相比原MossFormer有显著提升，并超越其他当前最先进方法。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供模型复杂度、参数量或推理实时性数据；未讨论在目标说话人提取任务上的适用性；循环模块的超参数和具体架构细节需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 该论文直接针对语音分离任务，采用时域方法和掩蔽估计框架，与研究方向中的关键词“speech separation”、“time-domain separation”、“masking model”高度匹配。其混合架构对解决复杂声学场景下的分离问题具有参考价值。

papers.title: F5-TTS: A Fairytaler that Fakes Fluent and Faithful Speech with Flow Matching
papers.summary: This paper introduces F5-TTS, a fully non-autoregressive text-to-speech system based on flow matching with Diffusion Transformer (DiT). Without requiring complex designs such as duration model, text encoder, and phoneme alignment, the text input is simply padded with filler tokens to the same length as input speech, and then the denoising is performed for speech generation, which was originally proved feasible by E2 TTS. However, the original design of E2 TTS makes it hard to follow due to its slow convergence and low robustness. To address these issues, we first model the input with ConvNeXt to refine the text representation, making it easy to align with the speech. We further propose an inference-time Sway Sampling strategy, which significantly improves our model's performance and efficiency. This sampling strategy for flow step can be easily applied to existing flow matching based models without retraining. Our design allows faster training and achieves an inference RTF of 0.15, which is greatly improved compared to state-of-the-art diffusion-based TTS models. Trained on a public 100K hours multilingual dataset, our F5-TTS exhibits highly natural and expressive zero-shot ability, seamless code-switching capability, and speed control efficiency. We have released all codes and checkpoints to promote community development, at https://SWivid.github.io/F5-TTS/.
categories: Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
papers.venue: Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
papers.justification: F5-TTS是流匹配TTS的代表性工作，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，方法简洁高效，已成为该领域重要基线。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决非自回归文本到语音（TTS）系统训练收敛慢、鲁棒性低的问题，提升流匹配在语音生成中的效率与零样本能力。
chinese_summary.method: 基于流匹配与扩散Transformer（DiT）的全非自回归TTS架构。文本通过填充符对齐到语音长度后去噪生成语音；使用ConvNeXt模块细化文本表征以改善对齐，并提出推理阶段Sway Sampling步长策略，无需重训即可提升性能与效率。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 引入ConvNeXt增强文本与语音的对齐易度；2) 提出Sway Sampling推理采样策略，在不增加训练成本下显著加速并提升流匹配TTS模型性能；3) 在10万小时多语言数据上训练，展现高自然度零样本复刻、无缝语码切换及语速控制能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在10万小时多语言公开数据集上训练，推理实时因子（RTF）达到0.15，相比现有扩散TTS有大幅提升；演示了零样本、语码切换、速度控制等能力，并开源代码与模型。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提及对比基准模型的具体客观指标（如MOS、词错率），泛化到低资源语言或极端噪声环境的表现尚不明确，需阅读全文验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接聚焦于流匹配在TTS（文本到语音合成）中的应用，与研究方向中的“speech synthesis and TTS”、“flow matching speech”高度吻合；其ConvNeXt对齐与Sway Sampling策略对生成式语音建模具有直接参考价值。

papers.title: NaturalSpeech 3: Zero-Shot Speech Synthesis with Factorized Codec and Diffusion Models
papers.summary: While recent large-scale text-to-speech (TTS) models have achieved significant progress, they still fall short in speech quality, similarity, and prosody. Considering speech intricately encompasses various attributes (e.g., content, prosody, timbre, and acoustic details) that pose significant challenges for generation, a natural idea is to factorize speech into individual subspaces representing different attributes and generate them individually. Motivated by it, we propose NaturalSpeech 3, a TTS system with novel factorized diffusion models to generate natural speech in a zero-shot way. Specifically, 1) we design a neural codec with factorized vector quantization (FVQ) to disentangle speech waveform into subspaces of content, prosody, timbre, and acoustic details; 2) we propose a factorized diffusion model to generate attributes in each subspace following its corresponding prompt. With this factorization design, NaturalSpeech 3 can effectively and efficiently model intricate speech with disentangled subspaces in a divide-and-conquer way. Experiments show that NaturalSpeech 3 outperforms the state-of-the-art TTS systems on quality, similarity, prosody, and intelligibility, and achieves on-par quality with human recordings. Furthermore, we achieve better performance by scaling to 1B parameters and 200K hours of training data.
papers.justification: 提出因子化神经编解码与扩散模型，实现零样本语音合成，质量媲美人类录音，是生成式语音技术方向的必读代表作。

chinese_summary.problem: 大规模文本到语音模型在语音质量、说话人相似度和韵律表现上仍有不足，难以精细捕捉语音的多重属性。
chinese_summary.method: 采用分解式神经编解码器（因子化向量量化）将语音波形解耦成内容、韵律、音色和声学细节四个子空间，然后使用分解式扩散模型在每个子空间中根据指定的提示生成对应属性。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出因子化向量量化（FVQ）实现对语音属性的无监督解耦；设计分解式扩散模型以分治法高效生成各属性子空间；通过将模型扩展至10亿参数和20万小时数据进一步验证了可扩展性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验表明在语音质量、相似度、韵律和可懂度上超越现有最优TTS系统，合成质量与人类录音相当；扩大参数量和训练数据后性能进一步提升。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度和推理效率；零样本泛化在极端领域可能受限；分解机制是否对语音增强等任务同样有效未验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接属于文本到语音合成（TTS）领域，并且采用扩散模型，完全匹配您的研究方向“语音合成、文本到语音、基于扩散模型的语音生成”等关键词。

papers.title: NaturalSpeech 2: Latent Diffusion Models are Natural and Zero-Shot Speech and Singing Synthesizers
papers.summary: Scaling text-to-speech (TTS) to large-scale, multi-speaker, and in-the-wild datasets is important to capture the diversity in human speech such as speaker identities, prosodies, and styles (e.g., singing). Current large TTS systems usually quantize speech into discrete tokens and use language models to generate these tokens one by one, which suffer from unstable prosody, word skipping/repeating issue, and poor voice quality. In this paper, we develop NaturalSpeech 2, a TTS system that leverages a neural audio codec with residual vector quantizers to get the quantized latent vectors and uses a diffusion model to generate these latent vectors conditioned on text input. To enhance the zero-shot capability that is important to achieve diverse speech synthesis, we design a speech prompting mechanism to facilitate in-context learning in the diffusion model and the duration/pitch predictor. We scale NaturalSpeech 2 to large-scale datasets with 44K hours of speech and singing data and evaluate its voice quality on unseen speakers. NaturalSpeech 2 outperforms previous TTS systems by a large margin in terms of prosody/timbre similarity, robustness, and voice quality in a zero-shot setting, and performs novel zero-shot singing synthesis with only a speech prompt. Audio samples are available at https://speechresearch.github.io/naturalspeech2.
papers.justification: 提出基于扩散模型和神经音频编解码器的零样本语音合成系统，大幅提升音质和自然度，属于生成式语音技术的里程碑工作，与研究方向高度相关且必读。

chinese_summary.problem: 大规模文本到语音（TTS）系统在处理多说话人、野外数据集时，使用离散标记和自回归语言模型导致韵律不稳定、跳词/重复和语音质量差，难以捕捉语音多样性（如说话人身份、韵律和歌唱风格）。
chinese_summary.method: NaturalSpeech 2采用基于残差向量量化的神经音频编解码器提取连续潜在向量，并使用扩散模型以文本为条件生成这些潜在向量；引入语音提示机制，将提示语音的潜在向量和时长/音高信息作为条件，实现扩散模型的上下文学习，支持零样本合成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 用潜在扩散模型替代离散标记语言模型进行TTS，避免了不稳定的自回归生成；设计了语音提示机制，使扩散模型和时长/音高预测器能够进行上下文学习，实现了强大的零样本语音克隆与歌唱合成能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在包含4.4万小时语音和歌唱数据的大规模数据集上训练，在未见过的说话人上评估，零样本场景下韵律/音色相似度、鲁棒性和语音质量大幅优于先前TTS系统；仅需语音提示即可实现新颖的零样本歌唱合成。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供具体评估指标数值和比较细节，也未讨论扩散模型的推理效率；零样本能力仅基于语音提示，未说明在复杂或极端口音下的表现；歌唱合成仅提及一种提示类型，泛化性需全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接匹配研究方向中的‘speech synthesis’、‘text-to-speech’和‘diffusion model speech’关键词，且该方法利用扩散生成模型实现高质量语音合成，与生成式语音技术的核心目标高度一致。

papers.title: StyleTTS 2: Towards Human-Level Text-to-Speech through Style Diffusion and Adversarial Training with Large Speech Language Models
papers.summary: In this paper, we present StyleTTS 2, a text-to-speech (TTS) model that leverages style diffusion and adversarial training with large speech language models (SLMs) to achieve human-level TTS synthesis. StyleTTS 2 differs from its predecessor by modeling styles as a latent random variable through diffusion models to generate the most suitable style for the text without requiring reference speech, achieving efficient latent diffusion while benefiting from the diverse speech synthesis offered by diffusion models. Furthermore, we employ large pre-trained SLMs, such as WavLM, as discriminators with our novel differentiable duration modeling for end-to-end training, resulting in improved speech naturalness. StyleTTS 2 surpasses human recordings on the single-speaker LJSpeech dataset and matches it on the multispeaker VCTK dataset as judged by native English speakers. Moreover, when trained on the LibriTTS dataset, our model outperforms previous publicly available models for zero-shot speaker adaptation. This work achieves the first human-level TTS on both single and multispeaker datasets, showcasing the potential of style diffusion and adversarial training with large SLMs. The audio demos and source code are available at https://styletts2.github.io/.
papers.justification: 高度相关于生成式语音技术（TTS），首次实现单/多说话人人类水平合成，采用风格扩散与SLM对抗训练，引用285，是必读基础工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 实现单说话人和多说话人场景下达到人类水平的文本到语音合成，无需参考语音即可生成适合文本的风格。
chinese_summary.method: 将语音风格建模为潜随机变量，通过扩散模型生成文本对应的最优风格，实现高效潜空间扩散；采用大规模预训练语音语言模型（如WavLM）作为判别器，结合新颖的可微分时长建模进行端到端对抗训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次在TTS中引入潜空间扩散，在无需参考语音的情况下完成风格建模；利用大语音语言模型作判别器，通过对抗训练和可微时长建模提升语音自然度；在单/多说话人数据集上均达到人类水平。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在LJSpeech上超越人类录音，在VCTK上达到人类水平，经母语者评判；在LibriTTS上零样本说话人自适应超越已有公开模型。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提及多语言或超长文本表现；风格扩散的多样性控制程度需阅读全文确认；对抗训练可能影响训练稳定性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接对应研究方向中的text-to-speech、speech synthesis及diffusion model speech，其风格扩散机制与对抗训练策略对生成式语音合成前沿方法有参考价值。

papers.title: Speak Foreign Languages with Your Own Voice: Cross-Lingual Neural Codec Language Modeling
papers.summary: We propose a cross-lingual neural codec language model, VALL-E X, for cross-lingual speech synthesis. Specifically, we extend VALL-E and train a multi-lingual conditional codec language model to predict the acoustic token sequences of the target language speech by using both the source language speech and the target language text as prompts. VALL-E X inherits strong in-context learning capabilities and can be applied for zero-shot cross-lingual text-to-speech synthesis and zero-shot speech-to-speech translation tasks. Experimental results show that it can generate high-quality speech in the target language via just one speech utterance in the source language as a prompt while preserving the unseen speaker's voice, emotion, and acoustic environment. Moreover, VALL-E X effectively alleviates the foreign accent problems, which can be controlled by a language ID. Audio samples are available at \url{https://aka.ms/vallex}.
papers.justification: 提出了跨语言神经编解码语言模型VALL-E X，实现零样本跨语言语音合成与翻译，属于生成式语音技术中TTS领域的代表性工作，与研究方向高度相关且影响力显著。

chinese_summary.problem: 实现跨语言语音合成，在仅给定源语言语音和目标语言文本的情况下，生成保留说话人声音、情感和声学环境的目标语言语音，并缓解外国口音问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出VALL-E X，一种多语言条件神经编解码语言模型。它扩展VALL-E，将源语言语音的声学token和目标语言文本作为条件，通过语言模型预测目标语言语音的声学token序列，并利用编解码器重建波形。模型继承上下文学习能力，支持零样本场景。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将神经编解码语言模型应用于跨语言语音合成，实现零样本跨语言文本到语音和语音到语音翻译；仅需一条源语言语音提示即可生成高质量目标语言语音，且完整保留说话人音色、情感和环境声学特征；引入语言ID控制，有效缓解跨语言合成中的外国口音问题。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要仅定性描述实验结果为可生成高质量语音，并提供音频样例链接，未给出定量指标（如MOS、WER等），具体性能需审阅全文。
chinese_summary.limitations: 缺少客观评估指标；多语言覆盖范围和模型规模未说明；上下文学习能力在跨语言翻译中的稳定性有待验证；零样本设置下对源语言口音和噪声的鲁棒性不明。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向包含语音合成与TTS，该论文提出了一种基于生成式语言模型的跨语言语音合成方法，直接对应于speech synthesis和text-to-speech，且涉及zero-shot合成，与研究兴趣高度吻合。

papers.title: Qwen-Music Technical Report
papers.summary: In this report, we introduce Qwen-Music, a powerful music generation model capable of producing highly musical and high-fidelity songs with complete vocal singing. Qwen-Music supports two core tasks: Text to Music Generation, which create entirely new songs from text descriptions, lyrics, and musical attributes, and Cover Song Generation, which reinterprets existing songs with different styles and vocal characteristics. Architecturally, Qwen-Music integrates three core components: Qwen-Music-Tokenizer, Qwen-Music-LLM, and Qwen-Music-Render. Qwen-Music-Tokenizer compresses audio into a 25 Hz single-codebook stream of Music Semantic Tokens that preserve semantic and melodic information for LLM prediction. Based on these tokens, Qwen-Music-LLM performs autoregressive music semantic modeling, with a key novelty being a melody-token-based chain-of-thought (Melody-CoT) mechanism that plans melodies before full-song generation, improving creativity, musicality, structural coherence, and reference-audio-based melody cloning. To overcome the fidelity limitations of discrete semantic tokens, Qwen-Music-Render performs generative stereo rendering, enriching acoustic details and producing high-fidelity stereo waveforms. Finally, we train Qwen-Music-LLM on more than 5 million hours of multilingual music data covering hundreds of languages. We first apply quality-aware pre-training curriculum, then use progressive post-training, comprising supervised initialization, offline DPO, and online GSPO, to further improve musicality and instruction-following ability. Across 600 Chinese and English prompts, Qwen-Music achieves state-of-the-art results in 13 of 16 objective musicality and audio-quality metrics. Professional evaluators also prefer Qwen-Music over leading proprietary systems. For cover song generation, Qwen-Music preserves reference melodies more accurately than leading proprietary systems.
papers.justification: 论文提出了大规模音乐生成模型Qwen-Music，包含音乐语义令牌、旋律链式思维生成和高保真渲染，与音乐信息检索与表示方向高度相关，是必读级工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何生成具有高音乐性和完整人声演唱的高保真歌曲，并支持从文本描述、歌词、音乐属性生成新曲，以及用不同风格和声线重新演绎现有歌曲。
chinese_summary.method: 模型由三部分组成：Qwen-Music-Tokenizer将音频压缩为25Hz单码书音乐语义令牌流，保留语义与旋律信息；Qwen-Music-LLM基于令牌进行自回归音乐语义建模，创新地引入旋律令牌链式思维（Melody-CoT）机制，先生成旋律再生成完整歌曲；Qwen-Music-Render对离散语义令牌进行生成式立体声渲染，增强声学细节并产生高保真立体声波形。训练采用质量感知预训练课程和渐进式后训练（监督初始化、离线DPO、在线GSPO），数据量超500万小时多语言音乐。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出Melody-CoT，通过先规划旋律再生成歌曲，提升创造力、音乐性和结构连贯性，并支持基于参考音频的旋律克隆；设计质量感知预训练与渐进式后训练策略，结合DPO和GSPO增强音乐性与指令跟随能力；在600个中英文提示覆盖的16项客观指标中13项达到最优，并获专业评估者主观偏好。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在600个中英文提示上评估，16项客观音乐性和音质指标中13项达到最优；专业评估者的主观偏好优于领先闭源系统；翻唱任务保留参考旋律更准确。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未披露模型规模和推理效率；生成结果可能受限于离散语义令牌的信息瓶颈；未验证音乐理解或表示学习任务的迁移能力；需阅读全文确认Melody-CoT的具体实现和渲染模块的细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向明确包含music generation，本文直接贡献于高质量音乐生成；Qwen-Music-Tokenizer学习的离散音乐语义表示可用于音乐理解任务，与music representation learning和self-supervised audio相关；LLM的音乐建模策略可能启发music encoder设计；整体架构可作为音乐基础模型参考。

papers.title: AutoSIFT: Automatic Style Sifting for Controllable Speech Generation with Arbitrary Style Infilling
papers.summary: State-of-the-art text-to-speech (TTS) models achieve impressive naturalness and expressiveness, yet fine-grained, disentangled control over speaking styles remains challenging. In professional scenarios such as film dubbing, game voice acting, and video content generation, users often need to modify a specific style category, such as emotion, age, or gender, while preserving all others. Existing style-controllable TTS methods typically rely on either text-described styles or speech-reference style transfer, making it difficult to jointly control explicit semantic attributes and preserve subtle, text-undescribed prosodic details. We propose AutoSIFT, a controllable speech generation framework for category-level style editing. AutoSIFT decomposes speaking style into known text-describable categories and unknown residual styles that capture non-verbal prosody and speaker-specific nuances. It consists of a generalized Style Disentangler, which extracts category-aware style prototypes from reference speech, and an Arbitrary Style Infiller, which selectively infills unspecified style categories from the reference. By replacing only text-specified style categories while preserving residual speech-derived styles, AutoSIFT enables natural, expressive, and highly customizable speech generation.
papers.justification: 提出风格解耦与任意风格填充的可控语音生成框架，创新性强，高度匹配生成式语音技术方向。

chinese_summary.problem: 细粒度解耦控制说话风格，在修改特定风格类别（如情感、年龄）时保留其他风格和未描述的韵律细节。
chinese_summary.method: 提出AutoSIFT框架，包含通用风格解缠器，从参考语音提取类别感知风格原型；任意风格填充器，根据文本描述选择性替换指定风格类别，保留残差风格，实现类别级风格编辑的语音生成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将风格分解为文本可描述类别和未知残差风格，通过填充机制仅替换指定风格而保留韵律细节和说话人特征，实现自然、表达力强的解耦风格控制，弥补了现有方法依赖全文本描述或全参考风格迁移的不足。
chinese_summary.evidence: 证据不足，摘要未提供实验数据、主观评价或与基线模型的对比结果。
chinese_summary.limitations: 残差风格分解和填充机制的有效性未知；类别级风格编辑的粒度与控制范围需要全文确认；可能仅适用于已知风格类别，未见对zero-shot风格的讨论。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 该论文属于语音合成（TTS）的风格可控生成，与您研究方向中的“speech synthesis and TTS”、“generative speech”直接相关，可为生成式语音风格解缠提供方法参考。

papers.title: Listen first: Output-based multi-microphone speech enhancement
papers.summary: Traditionally, hearing-aid speech enhancement (SE) algorithms rely on input-based feature estimation, often derived by a voice activity detector (VAD), to configure beamformers. Yet features extracted from noisy microphone signals can become unreliable in challenging acoustic scenes where users most need help. We introduce a novel paradigm in which the settings of a sound processing system are determined by evaluating characteristics of its output. To demonstrate this idea, we employ an output-based system that selects among a set of minimum power distortionless response (MPDR) beamformers. Although MPDR beamformers are typically avoided due to their sensitivity to steering errors, we show that they become effective within an output-based framework. We compare the proposed system to a conventional input-based minimum variance distortionless response (MVDR) baseline. Experimental results show that the proposed system consistently outperforms the MVDR baseline, particularly at low SNRs, in terms of SNR, ESTOI and PESQ.
papers.justification: 提出输出驱动多麦克风增强新范式，通过评估输出选择MPDR波束形成器，在低信噪比下显著优于MVDR，与麦克风阵列及波束形成高度相关，具有显著新颖性。

chinese_summary.problem: 传统助听器语音增强依赖输入特征（如VAD）估计来配置波束形成器，在复杂声学场景下特征提取不可靠，导致增强性能下降。
chinese_summary.method: 提出输出驱动的系统，通过评估助听器输出特性动态选择一组最小功率无失真响应（MPDR）波束形成器。该系统并行运行多个MPDR波束形成器，根据输出特征（如SNR、可懂度）选择最佳输出，避免了传统MPDR对导向误差的敏感问题。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将输出评估范式引入多麦克风语音增强，颠覆传统基于输入特征的控制逻辑；证明通常因导向误差而被避免的MPDR波束形成器在输出选择框架下可有效工作；无需显式声源定位或VAD，系统基于输出性能端到端优化。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验对比MVDR基线，在SNR、ESTOI和PESQ指标上均取得一致提升，尤其在低SNR条件下优势明显。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供输出评估的具体机制、MPDR候选波束形成器的数量与设计、计算复杂度，也未验证在动态声源或强混响环境下的性能，需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接涉及麦克风阵列波束形成（MPDR/MVDR）与多通道语音增强，与研究方向中的'波束形成'、'多通道语音增强'、'MVDR波束形成'等关键词紧密匹配，且提出了新颖的输出驱动框架，对阵列信号处理研究有启发意义。

papers.title: A Closed-Form Noise-Sensitivity Asymmetry for Causal Branch Selection in Minimal-Array TDoA Localization
papers.summary: Minimal-array time-difference-of-arrival (TDoA) localization with three planar receivers reduces to a scalar quadratic whose two roots can both be feasible target positions, leaving a branch-selection ambiguity intrinsic to the minimal geometry. Because a minimal array is the cheapest, most deployable passive configuration, this ambiguity is conventionally broken only by adding a fourth receiver or an angle sensor, sacrificing the very minimality that motivates the array. This article resolves it from the measurements alone. Implicit differentiation shows that the two roots share an identical sensitivity denominator, so classical root conditioning cannot separate them and the entire asymmetry resides in the numerator. A closed-form analysis then yields an exact sign condition for the asymmetry, and over the feasible interior the more sensitive root is the outer, physical one, away from two algebraic degeneracy loci. A causal, constant-memory selector smooths a per-root variability statistic, whose expectation is shown to be proportional to the per-root sensitivity in the noise-dominated regime, and selects the larger one. Across a dimensionless receiver atlas the physical root is the more sensitive at a median of 85\% of two-feasible-root operating points (median sensitivity ratio 16), and, because the more sensitive root is the outer one, a simple outer-root rule attains near-0.99 branch-selection accuracy on this interior, matched online by a causal, constant-memory realization. The decisive empirical finding is that smoothness- and continuity-based disambiguation, the natural alternatives, invert under timing noise and fall below chance.
papers.justification: 论文提出基于灵敏度分析的闭式分支选择方法，解决最小麦克风阵列TDoA定位的根本歧义问题，直接属于声源定位研究方向，理论新颖，实验充分。

chinese_summary.problem: 最小三平面接收器阵列的TDoA定位中，二次方程的两个可行根导致分支选择模糊，传统方法依赖增加传感器，本文仅从测量本身解决该模糊性。
chinese_summary.method: 通过隐式微分分析两个根的噪声灵敏度，发现灵敏度分母相同，不对称性集中在分子；推导出闭式符号条件，表明在可行内部更灵敏的根是外部物理根；基于此设计因果常数记忆选择器，利用每根变异性统计量（期望与灵敏度成比例）选择外部根。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次在不增加传感器的情况下，利用灵敏度不对称性解决三接收器阵列的分支模糊；导出了灵敏度不对称性的闭式条件与外部根规则；提出因果常数记忆选择器，相比基于平滑和连续性的方法在噪声下更鲁棒。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在无量纲接收器图谱上，物理根在85%的双可行根操作点更灵敏（中值灵敏度比16）；外部根规则在内部达到近0.99的分支选择精度；因果常数记忆实现匹配该精度；平滑和连续性消歧在定时噪声下表现低于随机水平。
chinese_summary.limitations: 限定于三平面接收器最小阵列；依赖噪声主导假设；代数退化轨迹附近性能未明确，需全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接匹配研究方向中的声源定位与DOA估计，研究最小阵列TDoA定位分支模糊问题，对麦克风阵列低成本部署有参考意义。

papers.title: Simple and Controllable Music Generation
papers.summary: We tackle the task of conditional music generation. We introduce MusicGen, a single Language Model (LM) that operates over several streams of compressed discrete music representation, i.e., tokens. Unlike prior work, MusicGen is comprised of a single-stage transformer LM together with efficient token interleaving patterns, which eliminates the need for cascading several models, e.g., hierarchically or upsampling. Following this approach, we demonstrate how MusicGen can generate high-quality samples, while being conditioned on textual description or melodic features, allowing better controls over the generated output. We conduct extensive empirical evaluation, considering both automatic and human studies, showing the proposed approach is superior to the evaluated baselines on a standard text-to-music benchmark. Through ablation studies, we shed light over the importance of each of the components comprising MusicGen. Music samples, code, and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/audiocraft.
papers.justification: MusicGen提出单阶段Transformer语言模型与高效令牌交织模式，实现高质量可控音乐生成，成为领域经典基线，与音乐信息检索与表示高度相关。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决条件音乐生成任务，即根据文本描述或旋律特征生成高质量音乐。
chinese_summary.method: MusicGen采用单阶段Transformer语言模型处理多流压缩离散音乐令牌，通过高效令牌交织模式生成音乐，避免级联多个模型。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出了单阶段语言模型直接建模音乐生成，无需分层或上采样级联架构；同时支持文本描述和旋律特征作为条件输入，实现更灵活的控制。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中通过自动评估和人类研究证明MusicGen在文本到音乐基准上优于基线模型；消融实验验证了各组件的贡献；代码和模型已开源。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及对长序列建模的效果、生成多样性、复杂音乐结构控制能力以及计算效率等潜在限制。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 匹配研究方向中的music generation关键词，且离散表示与音频表征学习相关，但侧重生成而非检索或表示学习。

papers.title: Genre Bias or Aesthetic Perception? Identifying and Mitigating Shortcut Learning in Music Evaluation
papers.summary: Music aesthetics scoring plays a critical role in applications such as dataset curation, generative model evaluation, and reward modeling for music generation. Recent approaches rely on deep neural networks trained on human-annotated ratings, but these models may exploit spurious correlations rather than capturing perceptually meaningful aesthetics. In this work, we identify a previously underexplored failure mode in music evaluation models: genre-induced shortcut learning. Through a systematic analysis of SongEval, we show that biases in training data lead to strong correlations between genre-related features and predicted scores, causing the model to use them as a proxy for aesthetics. This results in systematic overestimation of pop music and undervaluation of high-quality samples from other genres, leading to predictions that are inconsistent with human preferences. To address this issue, we propose a training objective that jointly reweights hard samples and regularizes group-level performance, encouraging the model to learn genre-invariant representations of musicality. Experimental results demonstrate that our method reduces genre-dependent bias and improves alignment with human preferences, as reflected by gains in both cross-genre and within-genre preference alignment.
papers.justification: 该文识别并缓解音乐美学评估中的流派捷径学习，属于音乐信息检索，提出重加权与正则化方法提升跨流派偏好对齐，方向高度相关且方法新颖。

chinese_summary.problem: 音乐美学评估模型存在类型诱导的捷径学习（genre-induced shortcut learning）问题，即模型利用训练数据中与音乐类型相关的伪相关特征来预测美学评分，而非学习真正感知上有意义的音乐性，导致对流行音乐的高估和其他类型高质量样本的低估，损害评估的公正性和与人类偏好的一致性。
chinese_summary.method: 提出联合训练目标，通过重加权困难样本（hard sample reweighting）和正则化组级性能（group-level regularization）来迫使模型学习类型不变的音乐性表征。在SongEval模型上进行系统分析，验证训练数据中的偏见来源，并对比所提方法在减少类型偏见和改善偏好对齐方面的效果。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次明确识别并系统分析音乐评估模型中的类型捷径学习现象；提出样本级重加权与组级正则化相结合的简单有效训练策略，无需额外标签或模型架构改动；针对类型偏见进行针对性缓解，提升模型在跨类型和类型内评价中的公平性与一致性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确指出：实验减少了类型依赖偏见，并通过跨类型和类型内偏好对齐指标的提升验证了方法有效性，但未提供具体数值或对比基准。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅以SongEval作为分析对象，方法对其他音乐评估模型或音频评估任务的泛化性有待验证；未讨论重加权策略的超参数敏感性和计算开销；音乐领域的结论是否直接适用于语音或其他声音领域需要进一步研究。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向为生成式语音技术，涉及生成模型评估与应用。论文探讨了生成模型评价中的偏见问题，与生成模型评估（generative model evaluation）这一关键词匹配，对构建更鲁棒的语音生成评估体系有潜在启发。但论文聚焦音乐美学和类型偏见，非语音场景，匹配领域存在差异，因此相关性较低，建议阅读前先确认其方法在语音评估中的可迁移性。

papers.title: Where Speech Enhancement Hurts Recognition: An Inference Time Polar Projection Diagnosis
papers.summary: Speech enhancement (SE) can substantially improve perceptual quality, yet enhanced speech does not necessarily improve automatic speech recognition (ASR). Existing remedies, such as retraining the enhancer jointly with recognizer or interpolating enhanced speech with the noisy input, can mitigate this mismatch, but common explanations such as artifacts and over-suppression remain qualitative and do not localize which enhancement component harms recognition. We propose inference time polar projection, a diagnosis for STFT domain enhancement. Given a mask $M=Ae^{jφ}$, polar projection forms $M_{α,γ}=A^αe^{jγφ}$, where $α$ controls magnitude strength and $γ$ controls phase correction. Sweeping these controls on frozen SE and ASR models turns ASR degradation into measurable magnitude and phase effects. Our projection analysis shows that magnitude strength is the operative axis, while estimated phase correction provides no recognition benefit. The optimal magnitude strength is recognizer dependent: waveform-input wav2vec2.0 favors strong correction, whereas log-Mel-input, noise-robust Whisper prefers weaker correction. Finally, the projection provides a simple mitigation for any SE front end in the STFT mask domain, without retraining either the enhancer or the recognizer, making it directly useful for voice assistants and agents that rely on enhanced speech.
papers.justification: 提出推理时极坐标投影诊断，揭示语音增强影响ASR的关键在于幅度强度，并提供无需重训练的缓解方法，与语音增强方向高度相关且新颖实用。

chinese_summary.problem: 增强语音有时会降低自动语音识别性能，现有解释无法定位是增强的哪个组件（如幅度或相位）造成了损害。论文旨在通过诊断方法量化STFT域增强中幅度和相位对ASR退化的影响。
chinese_summary.method: 提出推理时极投影诊断方法。对于STFT增强掩码 \(M = A e^{j\phi}\)，通过极投影构造 \(M_{\alpha,\gamma} = A^\alpha e^{j\gamma\phi}\)，其中 \(\alpha\) 控制幅度强度，\(\gamma\) 控制相位校正量。在冻结的语音增强和ASR模型上扫描这两个参数，将ASR性能变化直接归因于幅度或相位的调节效应。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出一种无需重新训练的轻量级诊断工具，首次将增强对ASR的损害分解为可独立控制的幅度和相位维度；发现幅度强度是影响识别的主要因素，而相位校正几乎不带来识别收益；揭示了最佳幅度强度因ASR模型而异（波形输入的wav2vec2.0偏好强校正，log-Mel输入的噪声鲁棒Whisper偏好弱校正），并且该方法可直接作为任意STFT掩码增强前端的即插即用缓解方案。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要给出了明确的实验发现：幅度强度是主导因素，相位校正无效；不同识别器（wav2vec2.0和Whisper）的最佳幅度强度相反。但摘要未提供量化指标，仅作为定性结论。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅适用于STFT域掩码增强器，对时域或直接波形增强方法不适用；诊断结论来自冻结模型，未与其他缓解方法（如联合训练）比较；相位校正无效的结论可能受限于当前的相位估计方法；未展示具体识别率提升数值。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究语音增强处理对下游ASR任务的影响，并提出一种改进增强掩码的方法以提升识别性能，属于语音前端处理的范畴，与我的研究方向“Speech Enhancement and Audio Frontend”中的神经掩码、去噪等核心问题高度契合，有助于理解增强与识别之间的深层关系并优化实际系统。

papers.title: EARS: An Anechoic Fullband Speech Dataset Benchmarked for Speech Enhancement and Dereverberation
papers.summary: We release the EARS (Expressive Anechoic Recordings of Speech) dataset, a high-quality speech dataset comprising 107 speakers from diverse backgrounds, totaling in 100 hours of clean, anechoic speech data. The dataset covers a large range of different speaking styles, including emotional speech, different reading styles, non-verbal sounds, and conversational freeform speech. We benchmark various methods for speech enhancement and dereverberation on the dataset and evaluate their performance through a set of instrumental metrics. In addition, we conduct a listening test with 20 participants for the speech enhancement task, where a generative method is preferred. We introduce a blind test set that allows for automatic online evaluation of uploaded data. Dataset download links and automatic evaluation server can be found online.
papers.justification: EARS 提供了高质量的全频带无回声语音数据集，覆盖多种说话风格，并建立增强与去混响基准，与语音增强及前端处理方向高度相关，是该领域的基础性参考资源，引用数较高，属于必读数据工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语音增强和去混响研究缺乏高质量消声、全频带、多风格语音数据集，限制了模型在不同说话风格和真实场景下的性能评估与泛化能力。
chinese_summary.method: 发布EARS数据集，包含107位说话者、100小时干净消声语音，覆盖情感、朗读、非语言声音和即兴对话等多风格；选取多种语音增强和去混响方法进行基准测试，采用客观指标与20人主观听音评估，并引入盲测集和自动在线评估平台。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提供首个大规模、全频带、消声且涵盖丰富说话风格的数据集，填补了现有资源中消声条件与风格多样性的不足；通过主观听音测试揭示生成式方法在感知质量上的优势，为后续方法选择提供依据；构建自动化盲测与在线排行榜，促进可复现和公平的模型对比。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确提及数据集规模、说话人数量及风格覆盖；使用了客观指标和20人听音测试；提供了盲测集和在线评估服务器。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅提供数据集和基准结果，无新型增强或去混响算法；消声环境与真实场景存在域差异，可能限制在其上训练的模型直接泛化；基准方法细节和对比结果未在摘要中展开，需阅读全文确认代表性和完整性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向聚焦语音增强与去混响，该数据集可直接用于训练和评估去噪、去混响模型，其多风格特性有助于提升模型泛化能力；基准测试结果可参考现有方法在该数据上的表现，但论文本身属于数据资源类贡献，非算法创新，需结合自身任务需求判断是否采用。

papers.title: Genhancer: High-Fidelity Speech Enhancement via Generative Modeling on Discrete Codec Tokens
papers.summary: We present a high-fidelity generative speech enhancement model, Genhancer, which generates clean speech as discrete codec tokens while conditioning on the input speech features. Discrete codec tokens provide an efficient latent domain in place of the conventional time or time-frequency domain of signals, so as to enable complex modeling of speech and allow generative modeling to enforce speaker consistency and content continuity. We provide insights into the best-fit generation scheme for enhancement among parallel prediction, auto-regression, and masking to demonstrate the benefits of conditioning on both pre-trained and jointly learned speech features. Subjective and objective tests show that Genhancer significantly improves audio quality and speaker-identity retention over the SOTA baselines, including conventional and generative ones while preserving content accuracy. Audio samples and supplement materials are available at https://minjekim.com/
papers.justification: 将离散编解码标记与生成式建模结合用于语音增强，高度相关于生成式语音技术方向，方法新颖且性能优越，是近期必读工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在语音增强中生成高保真且保持说话人一致性和内容连续性的干净语音。
chinese_summary.method: 将语音增强转化为以离散神经编解码令牌为生成目标的生成式建模，条件于输入语音特征；离散令牌替代传统时域或时频域，便于复杂建模和生成一致性控制；探索了并行预测、自回归和掩码三种生成方案，并融合预训练和联合学习的语音特征。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将离散语音编解码令牌用于生成式语音增强，在离散潜在空间进行高保真生成；系统比较了不同生成范式并验证了联合使用预训练与可学习特征的有效性；生成建模专门针对说话人一致性和内容连续性优化。
chinese_summary.evidence: 主观和客观实验表明，在音频质量和说话人身份保留上显著优于最先进的传统和生成式基线，同时保持内容准确度（具体指标见原文）。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未指明生成模型的具体类型（如自回归、扩散或流匹配），离散令牌编解码器的结构及预训练方式需查看全文；生成方案比较仅在论文中详细，泛化性待验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 该论文直接属于生成式语音增强，与您的研究方向关键词'generative speech enhancement'高度吻合。其生成建模、离散令牌设计以及对说话人一致性的关注，可为您的研究提供新思路，即使在摘要中未明确提及扩散或流匹配，但同为生成式方法，属于核心范畴。

papers.title: Universal Score-based Speech Enhancement with High Content Preservation
papers.summary: We propose UNIVERSE++, a universal speech enhancement method based on score-based diffusion and adversarial training. Specifically, we improve the existing UNIVERSE model that decouples clean speech feature extraction and diffusion. Our contributions are three-fold. First, we make several modifications to the network architecture, improving training stability and final performance. Second, we introduce an adversarial loss to promote learning high quality speech features. Third, we propose a low-rank adaptation scheme with a phoneme fidelity loss to improve content preservation in the enhanced speech. In the experiments, we train a universal enhancement model on a large scale dataset of speech degraded by noise, reverberation, and various distortions. The results on multiple public benchmark datasets demonstrate that UNIVERSE++ compares favorably to both discriminative and generative baselines for a wide range of qualitative and intelligibility metrics.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出基于扩散模型和对抗训练的通用语音增强方法，通过架构改进、低秩适应与音素保真度损失提升内容保留，与语音增强和生成式语音方向高度相关，方法有效且具影响力。

chinese_summary.problem: 开发一种在多种噪声和失真条件下既能提高语音质量又可懂度，又能保持语音内容的通用语音增强方法。
chinese_summary.method: 基于分数匹配的扩散模型与对抗训练相结合。改进网络架构以稳定训练并提升性能；引入对抗损失促使学习高质量语音特征；使用低秩适配与音素保真度损失来增强内容保留。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将对抗训练引入分数扩散语音增强框架，通过低秩适配和音素保真度损失专门优化内容保留。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要仅提及在大规模包含噪声、混响及各种失真的数据集上训练，在多个公共基准数据集上取得优于判别和生成基线的结果，但未给出具体指标数值。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未报告具体指标提升幅度；未说明扩散模型采样速度是否实用；未涉及多说话人场景下的性能。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向为语音分离，该论文聚焦语音增强，但所用基于扩散和对抗的生成方法可能对分离任务中的掩蔽估计或重建提供参考，需要人工确认细节是否可迁移。

papers.title: MIDI-RAE-JEPA: Hierarchical Representation Learning and Generation for Symbolic Music
papers.summary: Rich internal representations of musical structure are essential for music understanding tasks such as machine-assisted music co-writing, yet self-supervised approaches for symbolic music representation remain underexplored, particularly those that encode the hierarchical multiscale nature of musical structures. We present MIDI-RAE-JEPA, combining a pitch- and time-shift equivariance objective with LeJEPA and a Swin Transformer V2 encoder to learn such hierarchical representations of symbolic music encoded as piano roll images. The time-shift equivariance objective encourages the model to internalize temporal musical relationships. The encoder is trained purely on self-supervised objectives -- including a masked embedding predictor (MEP) -- with collapse prevented via SIGReg. A separate decoder trained on the frozen encoder embeddings achieves reconstruction F1 of 0.995, and a flow matching generative model conditioned on those embeddings produces generations that closely match the pitch register and rhythmic density of the conditioning excerpt, while mismatched conditioning yields unrelated but musically plausible output. Learned representations outperform a Haar scattering transform baseline on a downstream emotion classification task, and embedding distances increase monotonically with pitch and time shift magnitude, confirming measurable equivariance. These results suggest that equivariance-based SSL objectives, combined with sufficient fine-level encoder capacity, provide a viable path toward semantically rich, generatively useful representations of symbolic music.
papers.justification: 提出结合等变性目标与Swin Transformer的符号音乐层次表示学习框架MIDI-RAE-JEPA，在情感分类和条件生成上表现突出，与音乐信息检索与表示方向高度相关。

chinese_summary.problem: 针对符号音乐的自监督表示学习，尤其是如何有效编码音乐结构中的分层多尺度特性，以服务于音乐理解与辅助创作任务。
chinese_summary.method: 提出MIDI-RAE-JEPA，将钢琴卷帘图像化的符号音乐输入Swin Transformer V2编码器，结合音高与时移等变性目标和LeJEPA框架进行自监督训练；引入掩码嵌入预测(MEP)和SIGReg正则化防止坍缩；冻结编码器后训练解码器重构和流匹配生成模型。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次将对音高、时移的等变性约束引入符号音乐的自监督表示学习；2) 通过Swin Transformer的分层结构与JEPA类目标实现多尺度音乐特征提取；3) 验证了所学表示在下游情感分类任务上优于传统散射变换，并可直接支撑条件生成。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要给出具体可核验结果：重构F1达0.995；生成模型能够根据条件生成音区、节奏密度匹配的音乐，失配条件则产出无关但通顺的作品；情感分类任务表现优于Haar散射变换基线；嵌入距离随音高/时移幅度单调增加，证实了等变性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅基于钢琴卷帘图像，可能未考虑更多样的符号音乐表示；生成质量仅有定性描述，缺乏客观评估指标；情感分类任务的数据集和详细指标未提及；等变性收益的实际下游影响需进一步验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦音乐表示学习与自监督方法，与研究方向中的music representation learning和self-supervised范式直接相关；虽然针对的是符号音乐而非音频，但其设计的等变性和分层编码机制对音频表示学习有启发意义，尤其是基础音乐结构建模的思路。

papers.title: SLT 2026 REAL-TSE Challenge: Real-world Target Speaker Extraction from Conversational Recordings
papers.summary: We introduce the REAL-TSE Challenge, an IEEE SLT 2026 satellite challenge on target speaker extraction~(TSE) from real conversational recordings. Given a multi-speaker mixture and one or more enrollment utterances from a target speaker, participating systems must recover only the target speech. Unlike simulated read-speech benchmarks, REAL-TSE evaluates Mandarin and English recordings that contain natural overlap, reverberation, noise, channel mismatch, and conversational dynamics. The challenge defines two complementary tracks: an Online track for low-latency streaming extraction and an Offline track for full-context processing. Systems are evaluated with Token Error Rate (TER), Speaker Similarity (SpkSim), DNSMOS, and target-speaker activity F1. This overview paper describes the task definition, datasets, baselines, evaluation protocol, submitted systems, condition-wise findings, and lessons for future real-world TSE benchmarks.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 该论文组织了真实对话录音中的目标说话人提取挑战赛，直接匹配研究方向'Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction'，提供了实际场景的基准、数据和评估，但作为挑战概述，方法新颖性有限。

chinese_summary.problem: 定义并组织一个面向真实对话录音的目标说话人提取（TSE）挑战赛，提供标准化评测框架以推动实用化TSE技术的进步。
chinese_summary.method: 本文不涉及具体的提取算法，而是围绕挑战赛构建任务体系：给定多说话人混合音频与目标说话人的注册语音，系统需提取目标人声。设置了在线（低延迟流式）和离线（全上下文）两个赛道，采用Token Error Rate (TER)、说话人相似度（SpkSim）、DNSMOS和说话人活动F1等指标进行多维度评估。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次在真实对话录音上举办TSE竞赛，数据包含自然交叠、混响、噪声、信道差异和动态对话等复杂因素，贴近实际应用；同时设立在线与离线赛道，兼顾流式与全处理场景；评估引入多种指标，从可懂度、感知质量、说话人相似度和活动检测多方面衡量性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确给出了任务定义、数据集、基线、评估协议、提交系统分析和条件性发现等基本要素，但未提供具体实验结果或数值。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未知数据集规模、基线系统的具体架构及性能、提交系统的方法细节和最终结果排名；需要阅读全文才能评估挑战的实际难度和现有技术水平。

papers.title: Teaching Speech Enhancement Models to Sing: Domain Adaptation from Speech Enhancement to Singing Voice Separation
papers.summary: State-of-the-art speech enhancement models benefit from large-scale labeled datasets, whereas singing voice separation models suffer from limited available training data. To address this limitation, we formulate singing voice separation as domain adaptation from speech enhancement to singing voice separation. We investigate two fine-tuning strategies: full fine-tuning and parameter-efficient fine-tuning using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on a discriminative and a generative model. Models with either adaptation strategy outperform the same architectures trained from scratch by 0.29-1.8 dB in Signal-to-Distortion-Ratio. Full fine-tuning yields the highest singing voice separation performance, but catastrophic forgetting degrades speech enhancement performance. LoRA fine-tuning achieves competitive singing voice separation performance while preserving the original speech enhancement capability with only 6-12% additional parameters compared to the base speech enhancement model. Furthermore, the generative model shows improved generalization to an unseen test set. The results demonstrate that adapting pretrained speech enhancement models is an effective strategy for training singing voice separation models in data-scarce scenarios.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 将预训练语音增强模型域适应到歌声分离，通过LoRA微调平衡性能与灾难性遗忘，对语音分离方向有参考价值。

papers.title: The SonicAGI System for the REAL-TSE Challenge
papers.summary: Real-world target speaker extraction (TSE) remains challenging because target speech, interference, and enrollment are recorded under mismatched acoustic conditions with reverberation, noise, and irregular conversational overlap. This paper describes the SonicAGI submission to the REAL-TSE Challenge (IEEE SLT 2026). We take a data-centric approach that combines fully simulated mixtures from clean speech with real meeting overlaps, and use a frozen offline enhancer to provide a denoised mirror of real targets for auxiliary supervision. For the online track, we introduce SwiftNet-Lookahead, which inserts a single bounded-lookahead module before a strictly causal iterative separator and keeps the total system latency at 96 ms. For the offline track, we use a frame-level enrollment cross-attention USEF-TFGridNet with a magnitude-domain fusion stage that trades off perceptual quality and speaker fidelity. In the official evaluation, SwiftNet-Lookahead ranks second in Track~1 and USEF-TFGridNet ranks fifth in Track~2, both exceeding the challenge baselines. These results suggest that real-data-oriented training and track-specific modeling are effective for conversational TSE.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 方向高度相关，提出面向真实场景的目标说话人提取系统，结合混合数据训练和特定赛道建模，在REAL-TSE挑战赛中取得优异成绩，工作扎实但以系统设计为主，新颖性一般。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决真实场景下目标说话人提取（TSE）因声学条件不匹配、混响、噪声及不规则对话重叠导致的性能劣化问题。
chinese_summary.method: 以数据为中心，混合全模拟干净语音与真实会议重叠片段构建训练数据；利用冻结的离线增强器为真实目标提供去噪镜像以辅助监督。在线轨道提出SwiftNet-Lookahead，在严格因果的迭代分离器前插入有限前瞻模块，总延迟控制在96 ms；离线轨道使用帧级注册交叉注意力的USEF-TFGridNet，并通过幅度域融合权衡感知质量与说话人保真度。

chinese_summary.evidence: 官方评估中，SwiftNet-Lookahead获得Track 1第二名，USEF-TFGridNet获得Track 2第五名，均优于挑战基线系统。

papers.title: WanSong v1.0 Technical Report
papers.summary: Music generation foundation models have recently attracted significant industry attention. However, achieving efficient generation and high-fidelity long-form audio while supporting controllability remains challenging. To address these needs, we present \textbf{WanSong}, a simple yet powerful approach for long-form, commercial-grade song generation. Unlike autoregressive (AR) and cascaded multi-stage pipelines (\eg, AR followed by diffusion), \textbf{WanSong} is a pure diffusion-based model that directly generates high-fidelity, multilingual songs up to 5 minutes and outputs dual stems (vocals and background music) in a single run. In addition, our diffusion framework enables faster inference through step-distillation, and offers an efficient pathway for fine-tuning and customization to support downstream editing tasks.
papers.justification: 该论文提出了纯扩散的音乐生成模型，支持长形式多轨歌曲生成，与音乐生成研究方向相关，但作为技术报告新颖性一般。

papers.title: TF-Locoformer: Transformer with Local Modeling by Convolution for Speech Separation and Enhancement
papers.summary: Time-frequency (TF) domain dual-path models achieve high-fidelity speech separation. While some previous state-of-the-art (SoTA) models rely on RNNs, this reliance means they lack the paralleliz-ability, scalability, and versatility of Transformer blocks. Given the wide-ranging success of pure Transformer-based architectures in other fields, in this work we focus on removing the RNN from TF-domain dual-path models, while maintaining SoTA performance. This work presents TF-Locoformer, a Transformer-based model with LOcal-modeling by COnvolution. The model uses feed-forward networks (FFNs) with convolution layers, instead of linear layers, to capture local information, letting the self-attention focus on capturing global patterns. We place two such FFNs before and after self-attention to enhance the local-modeling capability. We also introduce a novel normalization for TF-domain dual-path models. Experiments on separation and enhancement datasets show that the proposed model meets or exceeds SoTA in multiple benchmarks with an RNN-free architecture.
categories: International Workshop on Acoustic Signal Enhancement
papers.venue: International Workshop on Acoustic Signal Enhancement
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 该工作针对TF域双路径语音分离/增强提出纯Transformer架构TF-Locoformer，通过卷积局部建模替代RNN，实现可并行化并达到SoTA，与语音分离和增强方向高度相关，是基础性突破。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在时频域双路径模型中去除RNN，同时保持语音分离与增强的高性能，并解决并行化、可扩展性不足的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出TF-Locoformer，基于Transformer架构，通过在前馈网络（FFN）中引入卷积层替代线性层来捕获局部信息，使自注意力专注全局模式；在自注意力前后各放置一个卷积FFN以增强局部建模；并引入针对时频域双路径模型的新型归一化方案。

chinese_summary.evidence: 实验表明，在语音分离与增强多个基准数据集上，所提无RNN架构达到或超越了现有最优性能。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度、参数量对比、实时性表现，以及对目标说话人提取任务的适应性，需阅读全文确认。

papers.title: X-SEPFORMER: End-To-End Speaker Extraction Network with Explicit Optimization on Speaker Confusion
papers.summary: Target speech extraction (TSE) systems are designed to extract target speech from a multi-talker mixture. The popular training objective for most prior TSE networks is to enhance reconstruction performance of extracted speech waveform. However, it has been reported that a TSE system delivers high reconstruction performance may still suffer low-quality experience problems in practice. One such experience problem is wrong speaker extraction (called speaker confusion, SC), which leads to strong negative experience and hampers effective conversations. To mitigate the imperative SC issue, we reformulate the training objective and propose two novel loss schemes that explore the metric of reconstruction improvement performance defined at small chunk-level and leverage the metric associated distribution information. Both loss schemes aim to encourage a TSE network to pay attention to those SC chunks based on the said distribution information. On this basis, we present X-SepFormer, an end-to-end TSE model with proposed loss schemes and a backbone of SepFormer. Experimental results on the benchmark WSJ0-2mix dataset validate the effectiveness of our proposals, showing consistent improvements on SC errors (by 14.8% relative). Moreover, with SI-SDRi of 19.4 dB and PESQ of 3.81, our best system significantly outperforms the current SOTA systems and offers the top TSE results reported till date on the WSJ0-2mix.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出针对说话人混淆的显式优化损失函数，提升目标说话人提取性能，在WSJ0-2mix上取得当时最优结果，与Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction方向高度相关。

chinese_summary.problem: 目标说话人提取系统在训练时侧重重建性能，但实际应用中仍存在错误提取目标说话人的说话人混淆问题，严重影响用户体验。

chinese_summary.innovation: 首次在目标说话人提取中显式建模并优化说话人混淆问题；提出两种基于小片段重建改善性能分布的新损失方案，替代传统仅优化重建误差的训练目标；在SepFormer基础上结合新损失形成端到端系统，无需额外模块。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上，SC错误相对减少14.8%，SI-SDRi达19.4 dB，PESQ达3.81，声称优于现有最优系统。

chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接针对目标说话人提取任务，提出解决说话人混淆的损失方案，与我研究方向的关键问题（speaker extraction, source separation）完全吻合，且涉及端到端方法和时间域网络。

papers.title: The CHiME-7 DASR Challenge: Distant Meeting Transcription with Multiple Devices in Diverse Scenarios
papers.summary: The CHiME challenges have played a significant role in the development and evaluation of robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. We introduce the CHiME-7 distant ASR (DASR) task, within the 7th CHiME challenge. This task comprises joint ASR and diarization in far-field settings with multiple, and possibly heterogeneous, recording devices. Different from previous challenges, we evaluate systems on 3 diverse scenarios: CHiME-6, DiPCo, and Mixer 6. The goal is for participants to devise a single system that can generalize across different array geometries and use cases with no a-priori information. Another departure from earlier CHiME iterations is that participants are allowed to use open-source pre-trained models and datasets. In this paper, we describe the challenge design, motivation, and fundamental research questions in detail. We also present the baseline system, which is fully array-topology agnostic and features multi-channel diarization, channel selection, guided source separation and a robust ASR model that leverages self-supervised speech representations (SSLR).
categories: 7th International Workshop on Speech Processing in Everyday Environments (CHiME 2023)
papers.venue: 7th International Workshop on Speech Processing in Everyday Environments (CHiME 2023)

papers.title: Dual-path Mamba: Short and Long-term Bidirectional Selective Structured State Space Models for Speech Separation
papers.summary: Transformers have been the most successful architecture for various speech modeling tasks, including speech separation. However, the self-attention mechanism in transformers with quadratic complexity is inefficient in computation and memory. Recent models incorporate new layers and modules along with transformers for better performance but also introduce extra model complexity. In this work, we replace transformers with Mamba, a selective state space model, for speech separation. We propose dual-path Mamba, which models short-term and long-term forward and backward dependency of speech signals using selective state spaces. Our experimental results on the WSJ0-2mix data show that our dual-path Mamba models of comparably smaller sizes outperform state-of-the-art RNN model DPRNN, CNN model WaveSplit, and transformer model Sepformer. Our largest model reaches an SI-SNRi of 23.4 dB. Code available: https://github.com/xi-j/Mamba-TasNet
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出双路径Mamba模型，利用选择性状态空间替代Transformer进行语音分离，在WSJ0-2mix上达到23.4dB SI-SNRi，为语音分离提供高效新范式，与语音分离方向高度相关且已成为代表性基线。

chinese_summary.problem: 自注意力机制的Transformer模型在语音分离中计算和内存效率低，而现有改进方法引入额外复杂度。本文旨在用更高效的选择性状态空间模型替代Transformer，解决语音分离的计算效率问题。

chinese_summary.evidence: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上，最大模型达到SI-SNRi 23.4 dB，且较现有最优模型参数量更小；代码已开源。
