papers.title: Target Speech Extraction with Conditional Diffusion Model
papers.summary: Diffusion model-based speech enhancement has received increased attention since it can generate very natural enhanced signals and generalizes well to unseen conditions. Diffusion models have been explored for several sub-tasks of speech enhancement, such as speech denoising, dereverberation, and source separation. In this paper, we investigate their use for target speech extraction (TSE), which consists of estimating the clean speech signal of a target speaker in a mixture of multi-talkers. TSE is realized by conditioning the extraction process on a clue identifying the target speaker. We show we can realize TSE using a conditional diffusion model conditioned on the clue. Besides, we introduce ensemble inference to reduce potential extraction errors caused by the diffusion process. In experiments on Libri2mix corpus, we show that the proposed diffusion model-based TSE combined with ensemble inference outperforms a comparable TSE system trained discriminatively.
papers.justification: 论文提出条件扩散模型用于目标说话人提取并引入集成推理，与语音分离和目标说话人提取方向高度相关，方法创新且实验验证有效，但引用数尚未达到经典基线级别。

chinese_summary.problem: 论文解决目标说话人提取（TSE）问题，即从多说话人混合信号中分离出特定目标说话人的干净语音。
chinese_summary.method: 使用条件扩散模型，以目标说话人线索（如说话人嵌入）作为条件引导扩散过程，生成目标语音。同时引入集成推理，通过组合多次推理结果来减少扩散过程的随机误差，提升提取质量。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将条件扩散模型应用于目标说话人提取；提出集成推理策略，有效缓解扩散模型生成过程中的不稳定性，提升提取精度。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在Libri2mix数据集上进行实验，所提扩散模型结合集成推理优于可比判别式TSE系统，但摘要未报告具体性能数值。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提及计算复杂度、实时性、对线索准确性的敏感性以及集成推理带来的额外开销。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 目标说话人提取可看作语音增强的特例，涉及从噪声（其他说话人）中增强目标语音，与我的研究中的去噪、去混响有共通之处；文中扩散模型已用于这些子任务，可能提供新的建模思路。但本文重点在TSE而非通用语音增强，需人工确认具体方法对前端处理的迁移性。

papers.title: CosyVoice: A Scalable Multilingual Zero-shot Text-to-speech Synthesizer based on Supervised Semantic Tokens
papers.summary: Recent years have witnessed a trend that large language model (LLM) based text-to-speech (TTS) emerges into the mainstream due to their high naturalness and zero-shot capacity. In this paradigm, speech signals are discretized into token sequences, which are modeled by an LLM with text as prompts and reconstructed by a token-based vocoder to waveforms. Obviously, speech tokens play a critical role in LLM-based TTS models. Current speech tokens are learned in an unsupervised manner, which lacks explicit semantic information and alignment to the text. In this paper, we propose to represent speech with supervised semantic tokens, which are derived from a multilingual speech recognition model by inserting vector quantization into the encoder. Based on the tokens, we further propose a scalable zero-shot TTS synthesizer, CosyVoice, which consists of an LLM for text-to-token generation and a conditional flow matching model for token-to-speech synthesis. Experimental results show that supervised semantic tokens significantly outperform existing unsupervised tokens in terms of content consistency and speaker similarity for zero-shot voice cloning. Moreover, we find that utilizing large-scale data further improves the synthesis performance, indicating the scalable capacity of CosyVoice. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to involve supervised speech tokens into TTS models.
papers.justification: 高度相关生成语音技术（TTS），提出基于多语言ASR监督语义标记的零样本语音合成，结合LLM与条件流匹配模型，在零样本语音克隆的内容一致性和说话人相似度上显著优于无监督方法，具有可扩展性，是必读工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 当前基于LLM的TTS模型中，语音令牌通常以无监督方式学习，缺乏与文本的语义对齐和显式信息，制约了零样本语音克隆的内容一致性和说话人相似度。
chinese_summary.method: 提出使用监督语义令牌，通过在多语言语音识别模型的编码器中插入向量量化获得；基于此构建CosyVoice，包含一个用于文本到令牌生成的LLM和一个基于条件流匹配的令牌到语音合成模型。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将监督语音令牌引入TTS模型；利用从多语言ASR模型提取的监督语义令牌，增强了文本-语音的对齐；采用条件流匹配模型实现令牌到波形的高质量合成，并且系统具备可扩展性，大规模数据能进一步提升性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验结果表明，监督语义令牌在零样本语音克隆上，内容一致性和说话人相似度显著优于无监督令牌；使用大规模数据后合成性能进一步提高。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供实验的具体数据集、对比基线和评估指标细节；多语言支持的实际语种范围和效果未知；未提及计算复杂度和实时性；令牌到语音合成部分虽用到流匹配，但整体方法对生成语音增强等任务的适用性待验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文属于文本到语音合成，与研究方向的关键词'speech synthesis'和'text-to-speech'直接匹配；核心组件使用了条件流匹配模型，这正是研究方向中关注的生成方法（flow matching applied to speech）；所提方法涉及神经声码器，对生成式语音合成和潜在修复拓展有参考意义。

papers.title: AudioPaLM: A Large Language Model That Can Speak and Listen
papers.summary: We introduce AudioPaLM, a large language model for speech understanding and generation. AudioPaLM fuses text-based and speech-based language models, PaLM-2 [Anil et al., 2023] and AudioLM [Borsos et al., 2022], into a unified multimodal architecture that can process and generate text and speech with applications including speech recognition and speech-to-speech translation. AudioPaLM inherits the capability to preserve paralinguistic information such as speaker identity and intonation from AudioLM and the linguistic knowledge present only in text large language models such as PaLM-2. We demonstrate that initializing AudioPaLM with the weights of a text-only large language model improves speech processing, successfully leveraging the larger quantity of text training data used in pretraining to assist with the speech tasks. The resulting model significantly outperforms existing systems for speech translation tasks and has the ability to perform zero-shot speech-to-text translation for many languages for which input/target language combinations were not seen in training. AudioPaLM also demonstrates features of audio language models, such as transferring a voice across languages based on a short spoken prompt. We release examples of our method at https://google-research.github.io/seanet/audiopalm/examples
papers.justification: AudioPaLM是统一语音理解与生成的里程碑式大语言模型，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，影响力显著，为必读基础工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 构建一个统一的多模态语言模型，使其能同时理解和生成语音与文本，解决现有分离式系统在语音识别和翻译中难以保留副语言信息、跨模态知识迁移不足的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 将文本大语言模型PaLM-2与音频生成模型AudioLM进行权重融合，形成单一的解码器架构；模型初始化自PaLM-2权重，借助文本预训练知识提升语音处理性能，同时保留AudioLM对说话人身份、语调等副语言信息的建模能力。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将仅文本的LLM与音频LM深度融合为语音-文本双重生成的统一架构，实现了语音识别、翻译中的零样本多语言泛化；利用文本训练数据辅助语音任务，显著超越现有系统；展示了从简短语音提示进行跨语言说话人音色迁移的新能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 证据不足：摘要仅声称在语音翻译任务上显著优于现有系统，可实现零样本语音到文本翻译及跨语言声音迁移，但未给出任何量化指标、实验设置或数据集信息。
chinese_summary.limitations: 生成能力主要集中在翻译输出的语音，未提及用于通用语音合成或增强任务；模型规模、推理效率及对训练数据的依赖程度未知；零样本翻译和音色迁移的可靠性与限制未说明。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文中的跨语言声音迁移功能与生成式语音技术中的零样本语音克隆和语音合成间接相关，但核心贡献在多模态语言模型，而非生成式增强、TTS或神经声码器，整体匹配度低，需人工复核是否具备参考价值。

papers.title: Emilia: An Extensive, Multilingual, and Diverse Speech Dataset For Large-Scale Speech Generation
papers.summary: Recent advancements in speech generation models have been significantly driven by the use of large-scale training data. However, producing highly spontaneous, human-like speech remains a challenge due to the scarcity of large, diverse, and spontaneous speech datasets. In response, we introduce Emilia, the first large-scale, multilingual, and diverse speech generation dataset. Emilia starts with over 101k hours of speech across six languages, covering a wide range of speaking styles to enable more natural and spontaneous speech generation. To facilitate the scale-up of Emilia, we also present Emilia-Pipe, the first open-source preprocessing pipeline designed to efficiently transform raw, in-the-wild speech data into high-quality training data with speech annotations. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of both Emilia and Emilia-Pipe. Demos are available at: https://emilia-dataset.github.io/Emilia-Demo-Page/.
papers.justification: 该论文提出了Emilia，首个大规模多语言多样化语音生成数据集，并配套开源预处理管线，直接推动生成式语音技术发展，引用高，是语音生成领域的基础资源。

chinese_summary.problem: 大规模语音生成模型缺乏足够自然、自发且多样化的训练数据，限制了生成语音的人类相似度。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Emilia数据集，包含超过10.1万小时、6种语言的大规模多风格语音数据；同时发布开源预处理管道Emilia-Pipe，能够高效将野外原始语音转换为带标注的高质量训练数据。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首个大规模、多语言、多样化的语音生成数据集，涵盖广域说话风格以支持自然自发语音生成；首个面向语音生成的开源预处理管道，实现从原始数据到训练数据的自动化清洗与标注；通过数据和管道双重贡献，推动语音生成模型向更拟人化方向发展。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要称实验证明了Emilia和Emilia-Pipe的有效性，但未给出具体指标，需阅读正文获取定量结果。
chinese_summary.limitations: 数据质量和风格细粒度未知；管道处理的效率和准确性未在摘要中验证；数据集的实际使用对语音增强和声码器任务的适用性待确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 该数据集可直接用于训练生成式语音模型，如语音合成、语音增强、神经声码器等，匹配研究方向中的speech generation和生成模型数据需求，尤其适合扩散模型和flow matching的训练数据要求。

papers.title: CosyVoice 2: Scalable Streaming Speech Synthesis with Large Language Models
papers.summary: In our previous work, we introduced CosyVoice, a multilingual speech synthesis model based on supervised discrete speech tokens. By employing progressive semantic decoding with two popular generative models, language models (LMs) and Flow Matching, CosyVoice demonstrated high prosody naturalness, content consistency, and speaker similarity in speech in-context learning. Recently, significant progress has been made in multi-modal large language models (LLMs), where the response latency and real-time factor of speech synthesis play a crucial role in the interactive experience. Therefore, in this report, we present an improved streaming speech synthesis model, CosyVoice 2, which incorporates comprehensive and systematic optimizations. Specifically, we introduce finite-scalar quantization to improve the codebook utilization of speech tokens. For the text-speech LM, we streamline the model architecture to allow direct use of a pre-trained LLM as the backbone. In addition, we develop a chunk-aware causal flow matching model to support various synthesis scenarios, enabling both streaming and non-streaming synthesis within a single model. By training on a large-scale multilingual dataset, CosyVoice 2 achieves human-parity naturalness, minimal response latency, and virtually lossless synthesis quality in the streaming mode. We invite readers to listen to the demos at https://funaudiollm.github.io/cosyvoice2.
papers.justification: 高度相关于生成式语音技术（语音合成与TTS），提出流式大规模语言模型CosyVoice 2，结合有限标量量化与块感知因果流匹配，实现流式零失真合成，是必读的近期经典工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有流式语音合成模型在面向交互场景时，响应延迟与实时因子成为关键瓶颈，CosyVoice 2 旨在实现流式合成的高自然度、低延迟及无损质量，并统一流式与非流式范式。
chinese_summary.method: 在 CosyVoice 框架基础上，引入有限标量量化（FSQ）提升语音离散标记的码本利用率；精简文本-语音语言模型架构，直接采用预训练大语言模型作为骨干；开发分块感知的因果流匹配模型，使单一模型同时支持流式与非流式合成；利用大规模多语言数据集训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出有限标量量化以优化语音标记的表示效率与码本使用；将预训练 LLM 直接作为文本-语音 LM 骨干，简化系统设计；采用分块感知的因果流匹配统一流式与非流式合成，实现流式模式下人类水平自然度与极低延迟。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要称在流式模式下达到人类水平自然度、近乎无损的合成质量及最低响应延迟，但未提供具体实验数据或对比基准，证据强度有限，需阅读全文验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提及模型规模、计算开销、多语言覆盖度、在噪声等实际环境下的表现，以及该方法能否泛化至语音增强或修复等任务。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 与我的研究高度相关：论文聚焦流匹配（flow matching）与语言模型驱动的语音合成（TTS），属于生成式语音技术；强调流式合成与低延迟，契合实时交互场景；涉及神经声码器相关的生成建模优化；匹配关键词：speech synthesis, flow matching speech, text-to-speech。

papers.title: VALL-E 2: Neural Codec Language Models are Human Parity Zero-Shot Text to Speech Synthesizers
papers.summary: This paper introduces VALL-E 2, the latest advancement in neural codec language models that marks a milestone in zero-shot text-to-speech synthesis (TTS), achieving human parity for the first time. Based on its predecessor, VALL-E, the new iteration introduces two significant enhancements: Repetition Aware Sampling refines the original nucleus sampling process by accounting for token repetition in the decoding history. It not only stabilizes the decoding but also circumvents the infinite loop issue. Grouped Code Modeling organizes codec codes into groups to effectively shorten the sequence length, which not only boosts inference speed but also addresses the challenges of long sequence modeling. Our experiments on the LibriSpeech and VCTK datasets show that VALL-E 2 surpasses previous systems in speech robustness, naturalness, and speaker similarity. It is the first of its kind to reach human parity on these benchmarks. Moreover, VALL-E 2 consistently synthesizes high-quality speech, even for sentences that are traditionally challenging due to their complexity or repetitive phrases. The advantages of this work could contribute to valuable endeavors, such as generating speech for individuals with aphasia or people with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. See https://aka.ms/valle2 for demos of VALL-E 2.
papers.justification: 在零样本文本到语音合成中首次达到人类水平，提出的重复感知采样和分组编码建模有效提升了稳定性、自然度和推理速度，与生成式语音技术高度相关，是必读的里程碑工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 零样本文本到语音合成中，如何生成自然且与说话人高度相似的高质量语音，并达到人类水平。
chinese_summary.method: 基于神经编解码语言模型的 VALL-E 2，引入重复感知采样以稳定解码并避免无限循环，采用分组编解码建模缩短序列长度，从而加速推理并改善长序列建模。
chinese_summary.innovation: 重复感知采样通过考虑解码历史中的标记重复来改进核采样，解决了无限循环问题；分组编解码建模将编解码器码本分组，有效缩短序列长度，提升推理速度并缓解长序列建模挑战。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在 LibriSpeech 和 VCTK 数据集上的实验表明，VALL-E 2 在语音鲁棒性、自然度和说话人相似度上超越先前系统，首次达到人类水平。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供生成速度量化对比、模型大小、对未见说话人的泛化细节以及是否开源代码。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文属于生成式语音技术中的零样本文本到语音合成，直接匹配研究方向中的 speech synthesis 和 text-to-speech，并采用生成式语言模型方法，与研究方向高度相关。

papers.title: DITTO: Diffusion Inference-Time T-Optimization for Music Generation
papers.summary: We propose Diffusion Inference-Time T-Optimization (DITTO), a general-purpose frame-work for controlling pre-trained text-to-music diffusion models at inference-time via optimizing initial noise latents. Our method can be used to optimize through any differentiable feature matching loss to achieve a target (stylized) output and leverages gradient checkpointing for memory efficiency. We demonstrate a surprisingly wide-range of applications for music generation including inpainting, outpainting, and looping as well as intensity, melody, and musical structure control - all without ever fine-tuning the underlying model. When we compare our approach against related training, guidance, and optimization-based methods, we find DITTO achieves state-of-the-art performance on nearly all tasks, including outperforming comparable approaches on controllability, audio quality, and computational efficiency, thus opening the door for high-quality, flexible, training-free control of diffusion models. Sound examples can be found at https://DITTO-Music.github.io/web/.
papers.justification: 提出扩散推理时优化方法实现可控音乐生成，与音乐信息检索与生成方向高度相关，方法新颖且性能领先。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在推理时实现预训练文本到音乐扩散模型的灵活、无微调控制，以生成具有特定风格或结构的音乐。
chinese_summary.method: DITTO 是一种推理时优化方法，通过从随机噪声开始，优化初始噪声潜变量以最小化可微分特征匹配损失，从而引导模型生成符合目标条件的音乐。利用梯度检查点策略降低内存消耗，无需修改或微调预训练模型。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出首个用于音乐扩散模型的通用推理时优化框架，可处理多种控制任务；完全无需微调，仅通过优化初始噪声即实现强度、旋律、结构等控制；在多个音乐生成控制任务上达到最优性能，在可控性、音频质量和计算效率上超越训练、引导和现有优化方法。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要列举了 inpainting、outpainting、looping、强度、旋律和音乐结构控制等应用场景，并声称在与训练、引导和优化方法的对比中取得最先进的性能，包括在可控性、音频质量和计算效率上的优势。具体实验数据未在摘要中给出。
chinese_summary.limitations: 方法仅展示了音乐领域的应用，迁移至语音扩散模型的效果未知；控制效果依赖预定义的可微分特征损失函数；对非可微的控制目标可能无效；实际应用需结合特定预训练音乐生成模型。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向为生成式语音技术，包含扩散模型在语音增强、合成等任务的应用。DITTO 提出的推理时优化控制方法在原理上具有跨领域通用性，可能被用于语音扩散模型（如 TTS、神经声码器、语音修复）的无微调控制，例如实现语音修补或风格强度调节。但摘要完全未涉及语音，且实验仅在音乐生成中完成，因此匹配度低，需人工复核以确认迁移可行性。

papers.title: AuEmoChat: Authentic Emotion Understanding and Rendering for Conversational Speech Synthesis
papers.summary: Conversational Speech Synthesis (CSS) aims to synthesize speech with human-like emotional expression and contextual consistency in user-agent interactions. Existing CSS methods struggle to render authentic human emotions due to limited predefined emotion label spaces (e.g., seven emotion categories), while redundant multimodal tokens in multi-turn dialogue history interfere with context understanding. To address these issues, we propose AuEmoChat, a CSS framework for authentic emotion understanding and rendering. First, we develop AuEmoCodec, which learns a discrete authentic emotion token space from large-scale emotional speech via finite scalar quantization, enabling a more authentic emotion representation than limited basic emotion categories. We further propose AuEmoToMe, an authentic-emotion-guided token merging algorithm that merges redundant tokens in multimodal dialogue history while preserving emotion-relevant context. We integrate it into an autoregressive text-speech model to predict the target authentic emotion token and speech tokens. Finally, we propose Authentic Emotion Flow Matching, which renders speech by jointly conditioning on merged dialogue context, target authentic emotion, and acoustic priors. Extensive experiments on the NCSSD-EmCap dataset demonstrate that AuEmoChat outperforms state-of-the-art CSS baselines and generates more expressive and authentic emotional speech.
papers.justification: 该论文提出基于离散情感令牌和流匹配的情感会话语音合成框架，属于生成式语音技术方向，与研究方向高度相关且质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 对话语音合成中，预定义情感标签空间有限，难以表达丰富、真实的人类情感，且多轮对话历史中的冗余多模态token干扰上下文理解。
chinese_summary.method: 提出AuEmoChat框架：1) 设计AuEmoCodec，从大规模情感语音中学习离散的真实情感token空间，突破传统有限情感类别；2) 开发AuEmoToMe情感引导的token合并算法，在多模态对话历史中保留情感相关上下文并去除冗余；3) 将两者集成到自回归文本-语音模型，预测目标情感token和语音token；4) 采用Authentic Emotion Flow Matching，以合并的对话上下文、目标情感token和声学先验为条件生成语音。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出离散的真实情感token表示学习（AuEmoCodec），代替预定义情感标签，增强情感表达的丰富性；设计情感感知的token合并机制（AuEmoToMe），降低对话历史冗余，提升上下文利用效率；将自回归建模与Flow Matching结合，在对话语音合成中实现情感可控的高质量生成。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在NCSSD-EmCap数据集上进行了实验，结果表明AuEmoChat优于现有SOTA对话语音合成基线，生成的语音更具表现力和情感真实性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 实验仅基于NCSSD-EmCap数据集，对其他对话场景的泛化性待验证；离散情感token空间可能在细粒度情感表达上存在量化损失；自回归生成可能导致推理速度较慢，需要全文查阅效率分析。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦于对话语音合成，使用Flow Matching作为生成模型，直接匹配研究方向中的‘flow matching speech’和‘speech synthesis’关键词；涉及情感语音的生成式建模，与生成式语音技术高度一致。

papers.title: Mustango: Toward Controllable Text-to-Music Generation
papers.summary: The quality of the text-to-music models has reached new heights due to recent advancements in diffusion models. The controllability of various musical aspects, however, has barely been explored. In this paper, we propose Mustango: a music-domain-knowledge-inspired text-to-music system based on diffusion. Mustango aims to control the generated music, not only with general text captions, but with more rich captions that can include specific instructions related to chords, beats, tempo, and key. At the core of Mustango is MuNet, a Music-Domain-Knowledge-Informed UNet guidance module that steers the generated music to include the music-specific conditions, which we predict from the text prompt, as well as the general text embedding, during the reverse diffusion process. To overcome the limited availability of open datasets of music with text captions, we propose a novel data augmentation method that includes altering the harmonic, rhythmic, and dynamic aspects of music audio and using state-of-the-art Music Information Retrieval methods to extract the music features which will then be appended to the existing descriptions in text format. We release the resulting MusicBench dataset which contains over 52K instances and includes music-theory-based descriptions in the caption text. Through extensive experiments, we show that the quality of the music generated by Mustango is state-of-the-art, and the controllability through music-specific text prompts greatly outperforms other models such as MusicGen and AudioLDM2.
categories: North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics
papers.venue: North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics
papers.justification: 论文提出可控文本到音乐生成的扩散模型Mustango，引入和弦、节拍等音乐知识控制生成，并贡献MusicBench数据集，与音乐信息检索与表示方向高度相关，工作质量扎实，有一定影响力（148引用）。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有文本到音乐生成模型缺乏对音乐特定属性（如和弦、节拍、节奏、调性）的细粒度控制，导致生成结果难以精确符合领域需求。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Mustango，一种基于扩散的文本到音乐生成系统。核心是MuNet模块，将音乐领域条件（和弦、节拍、节奏、调性）的预测与文本嵌入融合，指导逆向扩散过程。通过数据增强方法，利用MIR技术提取音频的音乐特征并转化为文本描述，构建MusicBench数据集。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将和弦、节拍等多种音乐领域知识显式融入扩散模型实现细粒度控制；设计MuNet条件模块，将音乐特征预测与文本嵌入协同调节生成；提出结合MIR特征提取的数据增强策略，构建大规模含音乐理论描述的数据集。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要提及广泛实验表明Mustango生成质量达到最优，且在音乐特定文本提示的 controllability 上大幅超越MusicGen和AudioLDM2。发布了包含52000多个实例的MusicBench数据集。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未说明音乐特征的具体表示形式及其对生成质量的影响是否可泛化到其他音乐风格；未提及模型是否适用于其他MIR任务（如标注、检索）；数据集构建细节与MIR方法的选用准则需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文匹配研究方向中的“music generation”关键词；使用了MIR技术提取音乐特征，为MIR在下游生成任务的应用提供示例。但核心贡献在于生成的可控性而非音乐表示学习或检索，建议人工复核是否关注生成控制与音乐领域知识的结合方式。

papers.title: YuE: Scaling Open Foundation Models for Long-Form Music Generation
papers.summary: We tackle the task of long-form music generation--particularly the challenging \textbf{lyrics-to-song} problem--by introducing YuE, a family of open foundation models based on the LLaMA2 architecture. Specifically, YuE scales to trillions of tokens and generates up to five minutes of music while maintaining lyrical alignment, coherent musical structure, and engaging vocal melodies with appropriate accompaniment. It achieves this through (1) track-decoupled next-token prediction to overcome dense mixture signals, (2) structural progressive conditioning for long-context lyrical alignment, and (3) a multitask, multiphase pre-training recipe to converge and generalize. In addition, we redesign the in-context learning technique for music generation, enabling versatile style transfer (e.g., converting Japanese city pop into an English rap while preserving the original accompaniment) and bidirectional generation. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that YuE matches or even surpasses some of the proprietary systems in musicality and vocal agility. In addition, fine-tuning YuE enables additional controls and enhanced support for tail languages. Furthermore, beyond generation, we show that YuE's learned representations can perform well on music understanding tasks, where the results of YuE match or exceed state-of-the-art methods on the MARBLE benchmark. Keywords: lyrics2song, song generation, long-form, foundation model, music generation
papers.justification: 该工作提出了面向长时音乐生成的开源基础模型YuE，在歌词对齐与音乐结构上表现突出，其学习到的表征在音乐理解任务（MARBLE）上达到先进水平，与音乐信息检索与表示方向高度相关且质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决长格式音乐生成中的歌词到歌曲（lyrics-to-song）任务，尤其是生成最长五分钟、保持歌词对齐、音乐结构连贯和高表现力人声的歌曲。
chinese_summary.method: 基于LLaMA2架构，采用轨道解耦的下一步令牌预测处理混合信号，通过结构渐进式条件化实现长上下文歌词对齐，并使用多任务、多阶段预训练策略进行训练；同时引入上下文学习方法支持风格迁移和双向生成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出轨道解耦的下一步令牌预测，有效克服密集混合信号问题；设计结构渐进式条件化机制，实现长文本歌词的对齐；开发多任务多阶段预训练配方，提升模型收敛和泛化能力；首次将上下文学习应用于音乐生成，支持灵活的创作控制。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中提及生成最长五分钟的音乐并保持歌词对齐和结构连贯；评估结果显示在音乐性和人声敏捷性上匹配或超越部分商业系统；在MARBLE基准上，学到的表示在音乐理解任务中达到或超过先进方法。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提供具体定量指标（如MOS、FAD等）的详细数值；长格式生成的客观评估难度大，人工评估细节待确认；模型规模和训练成本未说明，可能限制普通研究者复现；对尾部语言的支持仅通过微调提及，泛化性需验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接匹配研究方向中的music generation和music understanding；论文提出的音乐表示在MARBLE基准上表现优异，与music representation learning和audio foundation model高度相关；上下文学习和多任务预训练对self-supervised audio representation有借鉴意义。

papers.title: Music Understanding LLaMA: Advancing Text-to-Music Generation with Question Answering and Captioning
papers.summary: Text-to-music generation (T2M-Gen) faces a major obstacle due to the scarcity of large-scale publicly available music datasets with natural language captions. To address this, we propose the Music Understanding LLaMA (MU-LLaMA), capable of answering music-related questions and generating captions for music files. Our model utilizes audio representations from a pretrained MERT model to extract music features. However, obtaining a suitable dataset for training the MU-LLaMA model remains challenging, as existing publicly accessible audio question answering datasets lack the necessary depth for open-ended music question answering. To fill this gap, we present a methodology for generating question-answer pairs from existing audio captioning datasets and introduce the MusicQA Dataset designed for answering open-ended music-related questions. The experiments demonstrate that the proposed MU-LLaMA model, trained on our designed MusicQA dataset, achieves outstanding performance in both music question answering and music caption generation across various metrics, outperforming current state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in both fields and offering a promising advancement in the T2M-Gen research field.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.justification: 提出将LLaMA用于音乐理解（问答与字幕生成），贡献MusicQA数据集，是音乐信息检索与表示学习领域的重要进展，与研究方向高度相关且质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 文本到音乐生成面临大规模带自然语言描述的音乐数据集稀缺的瓶颈，同时现有音乐问答数据集缺乏深度，难以支持开放式音乐理解。
chinese_summary.method: 提出 MU-LLaMA 模型，利用预训练音乐特征提取器 MERT 获取音频表征，并借助 LLaMA 语言模型实现音乐问答与描述生成；通过从现有音频描述数据集自动生成问答对，构建了 MusicQA 数据集用于训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将音乐问答与描述生成统一到一个模型中，以增强音乐理解能力并服务文本到音乐生成；专门构建了面向开放式音乐问答的 MusicQA 数据集，填补了相关资源空白；模型在音乐问答和描述生成两个任务上均取得优于现有 SOTA 的表现。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声明实验表明 MU-LLaMA 在音乐问答和音乐描述生成的多个评估指标上超越了当前 SOTA 模型，但未列出具体指标名称或对比模型。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未直接验证模型对文本到音乐生成任务的提升效果；MusicQA 数据集的构造质量和多样性需要阅读全文确认；模型在多样化音乐场景下的泛化能力和训练细节尚未披露。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦音乐信息检索中的理解任务（问答和描述），采用了自监督音频表征模型 MERT，与我的研究方向“音乐信息检索与表征学习”“自监督音频表征”等关键词直接匹配，其利用音乐编码器进行下游任务的思路具有参考价值。

papers.title: A Survey on Audio Diffusion Models: Text To Speech Synthesis and Enhancement in Generative AI
papers.summary: Generative AI has demonstrated impressive performance in various fields, among which speech synthesis is an interesting direction. With the diffusion model as the most popular generative model, numerous works have attempted two active tasks: text to speech and speech enhancement. This work conducts a survey on audio diffusion model, which is complementary to existing surveys that either lack the recent progress of diffusion-based speech synthesis or highlight an overall picture of applying diffusion model in multiple fields. Specifically, this work first briefly introduces the background of audio and diffusion model. As for the text-to-speech task, we divide the methods into three categories based on the stage where diffusion model is adopted: acoustic model, vocoder and end-to-end framework. Moreover, we categorize various speech enhancement tasks by either certain signals are removed or added into the input speech. Comparisons of experimental results and discussions are also covered in this survey.
papers.justification: 全面综述扩散模型在TTS和语音增强中的应用，对生成式语音技术研究者具有重要参考价值，是了解该领域的必读文献之一。

chinese_summary.problem: 该综述旨在系统整理扩散模型在文本到语音和语音增强中的最新应用，弥补现有综述在扩散语音合成上的进展缺失。
chinese_summary.method: 采用分类综述框架：将文本到语音方法按扩散模型使用阶段分为声学模型、声码器和端到端框架；将语音增强按去除或添加特定信号分类；同时收集并比较各方法的实验结果。
chinese_summary.innovation: 区别于已有跨领域或较早的综述，本文专注于扩散模型在语音合成与增强两大核心任务上的应用，提供了面向TTS流水线各阶段的细粒度分类，并整合了最新的实验对比。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确提及包含实验结果的比较与讨论，但未列出具体指标或方法。
chinese_summary.limitations: 综述范围限于TTS和语音增强，未涵盖其他生成式语音任务（如语音转换、带宽扩展）；分类粒度可能较粗；具体技术实现细节需阅读全文进一步确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向聚焦生成式语音技术，关键词包括语音合成、TTS、神经声码器、生成式语音增强、扩散模型语音；本文直接覆盖这些主题，提供领域全面概览，有助于快速定位相关工作和评估方法进展。

papers.title: An Investigation of Incorporating Mamba For Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: This work aims to investigate the use of a recently proposed, attention-free, scalable state-space model (SSM), Mamba, for the speech enhancement (SE) task. In particular, we employ Mamba to deploy different regression-based SE models (SEMamba) with different configurations, namely basic, advanced, causal, and non-causal. Furthermore, loss functions either based on signal-level distances or metric-oriented are considered. Experimental evidence shows that SEMamba attains a competitive PESQ of 3.55 on the VoiceBank-DEMAND dataset with the advanced, non-causal configuration. A new state-of-the-art PESQ of 3.69 is also reported when SEMamba is combined with Perceptual Contrast Stretching (PCS). Compared against Transformed-based equivalent SE solutions, a noticeable FLOPs reduction up to $\sim 12 \%$ is observed with the advanced non-causal configurations. Finally, SEMamba can be used as a pre-processing step before automatic speech recognition (ASR), showing competitive performance against recent SE solutions.
papers.justification: 该工作首次将Mamba状态空间模型引入语音增强，提出SEMamba架构，在VoiceBank-DEMAND上取得先进PESQ且比Transformer降低计算量，与语音增强方向高度相关，具备成为基础性方法的潜力，引用数较高，是值得关注的重要工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 探索如何将无注意力机制的状态空间模型 Mamba 应用于语音增强任务，并评估不同配置下的性能。
chinese_summary.method: 采用 Mamba 构建回归式语音增强模型 SEMamba，包含基础、高级及因果/非因果等多种配置，配合信号级距离损失和度量导向损失进行训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将 Mamba 引入语音增强领域；在 VoiceBank-DEMAND 数据集上，非因果高级配置取得竞争性 PESQ 3.55，结合感知对比拉伸后达到 3.69 的新高水平；相比 Transformer 方法，计算量（FLOPs）减少约 12%。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验证据：在 VoiceBank-DEMAND 上，先进非因果配置 PESQ 3.55，结合 PCS 后 PESQ 3.69；FLOPs 较 Transformer 方案降低约 12%；作为 ASR 预处理步骤表现具有竞争力。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅在 VoiceBank-DEMAND 数据集上验证，泛化性未知；因果配置的实时性能未详细给出；与多种前沿增强方法的全面对比尚不充分。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向为语音增强与音频前端，该论文直接针对语音增强任务，所提方法可用于去噪、降噪等场景，且采用神经网络模型，与研究方向中的关键词 speech enhancement、noise reduction、neural masking 等高度匹配。

papers.title: GibbsDDRM: A Partially Collapsed Gibbs Sampler for Solving Blind Inverse Problems with Denoising Diffusion Restoration
papers.summary: Pre-trained diffusion models have been successfully used as priors in a variety of linear inverse problems, where the goal is to reconstruct a signal from noisy linear measurements. However, existing approaches require knowledge of the linear operator. In this paper, we propose GibbsDDRM, an extension of Denoising Diffusion Restoration Models (DDRM) to a blind setting in which the linear measurement operator is unknown. GibbsDDRM constructs a joint distribution of the data, measurements, and linear operator by using a pre-trained diffusion model for the data prior, and it solves the problem by posterior sampling with an efficient variant of a Gibbs sampler. The proposed method is problem-agnostic, meaning that a pre-trained diffusion model can be applied to various inverse problems without fine-tuning. In experiments, it achieved high performance on both blind image deblurring and vocal dereverberation tasks, despite the use of simple generic priors for the underlying linear operators.
papers.justification: 提出GibbsDDRM，将扩散先验扩展至盲逆问题，成功用于语音去混响，对生成式语音增强方向具有重要基础性和影响力。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决盲线性逆问题，即在测量算子未知的情况下，利用预训练扩散模型作为先验，从噪声线性测量中重建信号（如图像去模糊、语音解混响）。
chinese_summary.method: 提出GibbsDDRM，将去噪扩散恢复模型（DDRM）扩展到盲设置。通过构建数据、测量和线性算子的联合分布，使用预训练扩散模型作为数据先验，并采用一种高效的部分塌陷Gibbs采样器进行后验采样，从而实现问题无关的求解。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将DDRM框架扩展至盲逆问题，无需已知线性算子；采用部分塌陷Gibbs采样策略，有效进行联合后验推断；方法具有通用性，同一预训练扩散模型可直接应用于不同逆问题而无需微调。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要在盲图像去模糊和语音解混响两个任务上报告了高性能表现，且仅使用了简单的通用算子先验。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅验证了两种任务，对更复杂的退化类型（如非高斯噪声或高度非结构化算子）的有效性未知；未提及计算效率或采样步数；需要阅读全文确认Gibbs采样的稳定性和与现有盲逆求解器的对比细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文将扩散模型应用于语音解混响，属于生成式语音增强/恢复的范畴，与研究方向中的‘diffusion model speech’、‘speech restoration’和‘generative speech enhancement’直接匹配。尽管方法通用，但语音任务是主要验证场景之一，可为扩散模型在语音逆问题中的应用提供参考。

papers.title: Dense-Sparse Dynamic Time Warping for Customizing Piano Concerto Accompaniments
papers.summary: In this study, we explore how pianists can customize Music Minus One (MMO) concerto accompaniments to match their playing style. Bypassing the need for a symbolic score, often not available digitally, we use three types of audio data: solo piano recordings, MMO orchestra-only recordings, and mixed recordings of both piano and orchestra (e.g., from YouTube). The mixed recording serves as an intermediary reference to align the solo and orchestra parts, with only the orchestral part being adjusted through time-scale modification to synchronize with the user's playing. The main challenge with estimating these alignments is the spectral mismatch between recordings containing different musical parts. Motivated by this application scenario, we introduce Dense-Sparse DTW, a variant of Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) that is designed to improve robustness of alignments to spectral mismatch by focusing on aligning a selected subset of audio frames containing prominent timing cues. We collect and annotate data from four piano concerto movements and establish a framework for generating and evaluating customized accompaniment recordings. On this benchmark, we show that Dense-Sparse DTW has better or comparable performance than more complex approaches based on source separation and spectral subtraction techniques.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 该论文提出Dense-Sparse DTW解决钢琴协奏曲音频对齐中的频谱不匹配问题，属于音乐信息检索与对齐，与我的MIR方向高度相关，在四个乐章上验证性能优于源分离等复杂方法，质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在缺少数字乐谱的情况下，使钢琴家能够根据个人演奏风格定制管弦乐伴奏，通过音频对齐实现时间同步。
chinese_summary.method: 提出 Dense-Sparse DTW 算法，一种动态时间规整变体，通过仅选择包含显著时间线索的音频帧子集进行对齐，减少因不同声部录音造成的频谱不匹配影响；利用混合录音作为中介参考，对管弦乐部分进行时间尺度修改以匹配用户独奏。
chinese_summary.innovation: 引入 Dense-Sparse DTW，避免对整个序列进行全对齐，仅关注关键时间帧，提升频谱不匹配下的对齐鲁棒性；无需依赖源分离或频谱减法等复杂预处理；利用易于获取的混合录音（如 YouTube 音频）作为对齐参照，简化定制流程。
chinese_summary.evidence: 收集并标注四个钢琴协奏曲乐章数据，建立评估框架，实验表明 Dense-Sparse DTW 性能优于或可比基于源分离和频谱减法的方法。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅在钢琴协奏曲上验证，泛化到其他乐器或场景需确认；依赖用户提供的独奏录音和对应的混合录音，实际获取可能不便；关键帧选择策略可能影响对齐效果。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 关键词命中“source separation”，但论文仅将其作为对比方法，自身不研究源分离；核心是音频对齐和时间规整，与语音分离、目标说话人提取方向差异显著，匹配度低。

papers.title: Harness TTS: Towards Context-Aware Expressive Speech Synthesis with Harness Layer
papers.summary: Expressive speech synthesis for voice assistants requires flexible style control that adapts to explicit requests and broader interaction context. We propose Harness TTS, a lightweight control layer that wraps around a TTS engine to externalize and govern its expressive behavior. It reformulates style control as closed-set prompt-tool routing: offline, a compact registry of stylistic prompt tools is constructed with structured metadata; online, an LLM planner selects the appropriate tool based on a priority-aware observation schema, and the TTS executor synthesizes speech using the corresponding prompt audio. We evaluate Harness TTS on both routing and synthesis tasks. In routing, Qwen3-4B achieves Top-1 accuracies of 74.3%, 43.0%, and 64.6% on explicit, implicit, and conflict subsets. For synthesis, experiments on CosyVoice3 and VoxCPM2 show that Harness TTS outperforms instruction-only control, achieving higher instruction-following win rates (margins of 23.1-35.6 points on CosyVoice3 and 13.8-20.0 points on VoxCPM2) and improving UTMOSv2 scores by 0.11-0.38. Moreover, the 4B planner delivers its first tool recommendation in under 50 ms in standard mode, introducing negligible latency for real-time interaction. These results demonstrate that equipping TTS engines with a dedicated Harness layer offers a practical, auditable, and context-aware solution for voice assistant expression control.
papers.justification: 提出Harness层实现上下文感知的TTS表现力控制，通过LLM路由选择提示工具，在语音合成质量与指令遵循上取得提升，与生成语音技术方向高度相关，工作扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 语音助手中的表达性语音合成需要根据显式指令和交互上下文灵活调整风格，但现有TTS引擎缺乏轻量级、可审计的上下文感知风格控制机制。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Harness TTS，一个包裹在TTS引擎外的轻量级控制层。将风格控制转化为闭集提示工具路由：离线构建带有结构化元数据的风格工具注册表，在线由LLM规划器根据优先感知观察模式选择工具，TTS执行器使用对应提示音频进行合成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将表达控制外部化为可审计的Harness层，无需修改TTS内核；将风格选择建模为闭集工具路由问题，结合LLM规划器实现上下文感知决策；以<50ms延迟实现实时交互，适用于语音助手实际场景。
chinese_summary.evidence: 路由实验：Qwen3-4B在显式、隐式、冲突子集上Top-1准确率分别为74.3%、43.0%、64.6%。合成实验：在CosyVoice3和VoxCPM2上，指令遵循胜率领先23.1-35.6和13.8-20.0个百分点，UTMOSv2提高0.11-0.38。延迟：首次工具推荐<50ms。
chinese_summary.limitations: 隐式上下文子集准确率仅43.0%，复杂场景理解可能不足；依赖预定义的风格工具注册表，不支持开放集风格；未验证对多种TTS引擎的通用性，以及长对话历史下的延迟和效果。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究TTS系统的表达性风格控制，与研究方向中的语音合成、文本转语音密切匹配，提供了一种结合LLM与TTS的实用框架，对生成式语音技术应用开发有参考价值。但侧重控制层面而非生成模型算法，需读者判断是否深入。

papers.title: Towards Array-Invariant Speech Enhancement via Geometry-Aware Dynamic Convolution
papers.summary: Multi-channel speech enhancement (SE) systems exhibit superior performance over single-channel methods but are constrained to fixed microphone array configurations. This restricts their real-world deployment across devices with diverse array geometries. While recent array-agnostic SE methods address variable microphone numbers and permutations, they largely fail to exploit explicit array geometry priors when available, missing a crucial cue for optimal spatial filtering. A Geometry-Aware Dynamic Convolution (Geo-DConv) framework is proposed, which explicitly leverages microphone coordinates to transform standard fixed-array SE models into robust array-invariant systems. Experiments are conducted on the recent real-recorded RealMAN multi-channel speech dataset. Results demonstrate that the proposed architecture enables two widely used fixed-array models to adapt to array-invariant settings, with consistent performance improvements across diverse array topologies.
papers.justification: 提出几何感知动态卷积实现阵列不变语音增强，充分利用麦克风坐标先验改进空间滤波，与麦克风阵列与波束形成方向高度相关，质量扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 多通道语音增强系统受限于固定麦克风阵列配置，难以跨不同阵列几何的设备部署；现有阵列无关方法未充分利用阵列几何先验，导致空间滤波最优性缺失。
chinese_summary.method: 提出几何感知动态卷积（Geo-DConv）框架，以麦克风坐标为显式输入，通过动态卷积生成自适应权重，将标准固定阵列语音增强模型转换为阵列不变系统，使其能够泛化至任意阵列拓扑。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次显式利用麦克风几何坐标作为空间先验，弥补了阵列无关方法在最优空间滤波上的短板；通过动态卷积实现模型参数随阵列配置的动态调整，无需重新训练即可适配新阵列；在真实录音数据集上验证了将固定阵列模型改造为阵列不变系统的可行性与有效性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在RealMAN真实多通道语音数据集上进行实验，两个广泛使用的固定阵列模型采用所提架构后，在不同阵列拓扑上均取得一致性能提升；摘要未提供具体数值指标或消融实验细节。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅验证两个固定阵列模型，泛化性有待更多模型检验；依赖精确麦克风坐标，实际应用中坐标标定误差的影响未讨论；动态卷积的计算开销和实现细节未提及；仅在单一数据集上评估，复杂声学场景下的鲁棒性未知。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦多通道语音增强中的空间滤波，利用阵列几何信息提升阵列不变性，与我的研究方向“麦克风阵列与波束形成”高度契合，尤其在神经波束形成、空间特征利用和多通道语音增强方面有直接交集，其动态卷积方法为可学习空间滤波提供新思路。

papers.title: Staged Depth-Pruning Distillation of a Flow-Matching Text-to-Speech Teacher: A Compact Hindi Speech Synthesizer
papers.summary: We present a practical recipe for building a compact Hindi text-to-speech (TTS) model by distilling a large flow-matching teacher (IndicF5, 337M-parameter DiT) under a severe data budget (~17.6 hours). Training a small model from scratch on this much data fails outright. Instead we warm-start the student from the teacher by pruning depth only: keeping the teacher's width, text dimension, attention heads, and mel/text I/O fixed so all non-block tensors copy one-to-one, and retaining an evenly-spaced subset of transformer blocks. We first measure how much depth the teacher tolerates (it remains near-functional at -27% blocks but collapses past -50%), then descend gradually (22 -> 16 -> 12 -> 8 -> 6 blocks), re-fine-tuning after each prune, with each step gated by an objective ASR word-error-rate (WER) check. The resulting students reach WER 0.00 on unseen sentences at 249M and 190M parameters, and remain robust down to 131M; at 102M we observe a clear capacity cliff that we attribute to the data budget rather than the recipe. We also document two train/inference feature- and library-parity failures (mel filterbank and rotary-embedding library versions) that silently degrade audio, and a version-independent fix. The method yields a high-quality Hindi voice that runs in real time on a 6 GB laptop GPU. An independent 50-sentence FLEURS benchmark compares the released 190M student against its teacher and MMS-TTS-hin.
papers.justification: 该工作使用深度剪枝蒸馏紧凑化流匹配TTS模型，属于生成式语音技术，与研究方向相关，在数据受限下获得实用合成器，质量扎实但方法新颖性一般。

chinese_summary.problem: 在数据极度受限（约17.6小时）下构建紧凑的印地语TTS模型，解决从头训练小模型会失败的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 分阶段深度剪枝蒸馏：以流匹配大模型（IndicF5, 337M参数DiT）为教师，通过仅剪枝Transformer块深度（保留宽度和所有非块张量一对一复制）初始化学生模型；逐步减少块数（22→16→12→8→6），每次剪枝后微调，并以ASR词错误率（WER）为门控指标；同时发现并修复了因mel滤波器组和旋转嵌入库版本不匹配导致的音频质量退化。
chinese_summary.innovation: （1）在极低数据预算下，利用深度剪枝蒸馏成功压缩流匹配TTS模型，避免从头训练失败；（2）采用渐进式剪枝与WER检查，确定容量悬崖（102M参数时退化归因于数据量而非方法）；（3）识别并提供了库版本不匹配导致音频质量下降的通用修复方案。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验显示学生模型在未见句子上达到WER 0.00（249M和190M参数），131M保持鲁棒，102M出现性能悬崖；发布的190M模型在6GB笔记本GPU上实时运行，并在FLEURS基准上与教师模型和MMS-TTS-hin对比。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅针对印地语，数据规模小，泛化性未验证；依赖ASR WER而缺乏主观音质评价；容量悬崖的界限可能与特定数据分布相关。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心为流匹配文本到语音生成，直接匹配研究方向中的“text-to-speech”、“flow matching speech”和“speech synthesis”。但侧重于模型压缩而非生成模型创新或增强/恢复应用，与生成式语音增强、语音恢复等关联较弱，建议人工复核以确定对生成技术本身的参考价值。

papers.title: CS-ETS: Chaos-Inspired Samba-Based EMG-To-Speech Synthesis with Nonlinear Chaotic Losses
papers.summary: We propose a chaos-inspired new architecture for EMG-to-Speech (ETS) synthesis called CS-ETS, which combines a Samba-based encoder with two novel chaos-inspired loss functions -- Lyapunov Exponent Regularization (LER) and Multi-Scale Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (MSDFA). LER is designed based on Lyapunov exponents to capture nonlinear fluctuations and sensitivity to initial conditions. MSDFA exploits detrended fluctuation analysis to quantify fractal-like, long-range temporal chaotic correlation. CS-ETS surpasses prior work with a 40.79\% lower parameter count (32M vs 54.1M) and introduces a new Post-Vocoder Alignment approach that improves LSD by 2.1x, STOI by 4.7x, and SI-SDR by 1.25x. CS-ETS reduces computation by 13.33\% while maintaining improved performance. To the best of our knowledge, for the first time, we show how ETS can be supervised by the subtle non-linear chaotic physics with Samba attention to achieve a significantly smaller model with superior performance.
papers.justification: 论文提出混沌启发式损失函数的EMG-to-Speech合成方法，属于生成语音技术中的语音合成方向，方法新颖且指标提升显著，但EMG输入非主流音频前端任务，与核心语音增强/分离相关性有限。

chinese_summary.problem: 从表面肌电信号直接合成可懂语音，解决现有EMG-to-Speech模型参数量大、对非线性动力学建模不足的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出CS-ETS架构，采用Samba注意力编码器提取EMG特征，并设计两个混沌启发的损失函数：李雅普诺夫指数正则化（LER）捕捉非线性波动和初值敏感性，多尺度去趋势波动分析（MSDFA）量化长程分形相关；推理时使用Post-Vocoder Alignment后处理改善合成语音的客观质量。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将混沌物理约束引入EMG-to-Speech训练的损失函数，利用LER和MSDFA捕捉肌电信号的非线性动力学；采用轻量化Samba编码器并结合后声码器对齐策略，在参数量和计算量显著降低的同时提升语音质量。
chinese_summary.evidence: 参数减少40.79%（32M vs 54.1M），LSD改善2.1倍，STOI改善4.7倍，SI-SDR改善1.25倍，计算量降低13.33%。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未提及具体数据集、对比基线方法、混沌损失的计算开销及不同声码器的兼容性，后处理对齐的实时性待确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 涉及语音合成（EMG-to-Speech）和声码器后处理，与研究方向中的'speech synthesis'关键词直接匹配，但非典型TTS或生成式语音增强，而是生物信号到语音的跨模态生成，需要人工确认是否关注此类特殊输入方式。

papers.title: Metis: A Foundation Speech Generation Model with Masked Generative Pre-training
papers.summary: We introduce Metis, a foundation model for unified speech generation. Unlike previous task-specific or multi-task models, Metis follows a pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm. It is pre-trained on large-scale unlabeled speech data using masked generative modeling and then fine-tuned to adapt to diverse speech generation tasks. Specifically, 1) Metis utilizes two discrete speech representations: SSL tokens derived from speech self-supervised learning (SSL) features, and acoustic tokens directly quantized from waveforms. 2) Metis performs masked generative pre-training on SSL tokens, utilizing 300K hours of diverse speech data, without any additional condition. 3) Through fine-tuning with task-specific conditions, Metis achieves efficient adaptation to various speech generation tasks while supporting multimodal input, even when using limited data and trainable parameters. Experiments demonstrate that Metis can serve as a foundation model for unified speech generation: Metis outperforms state-of-the-art task-specific or multi-task systems across five speech generation tasks, including zero-shot text-to-speech, voice conversion, target speaker extraction, speech enhancement, and lip-to-speech, even with fewer than 20M trainable parameters or 300 times less training data. Audio samples are are available at https://metis-demo.github.io/.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出统一语音生成基础模型Metis，通过掩码生成预训练实现目标说话人提取和语音增强等多任务SOTA，与生成式语音及分离增强方向高度相关。

chinese_summary.problem: 构建统一的语音生成基础模型，通过预训练和微调范式适应多种语音生成任务，而非专门针对目标说话人提取。
chinese_summary.method: 利用大规模无标签语音数据，对语音自监督学习（SSL）特征离散化后的SSL令牌进行掩码生成预训练；微调时结合任务特定条件（如说话人嵌入、文本、视觉等），将预训练模型高效迁移到下游语音生成任务，包括目标说话人提取。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将掩码生成预训练范式应用于统一语音生成，使用离散SSL令牌作为中间表征；仅使用300K小时无标签数据预训练，并在五种语音生成任务上通过轻量微调（参数少于20M或数据量减少300倍）超过现有专门或多任务系统；支持多模态输入条件，实现高效任务切换。
chinese_summary.evidence: 实验覆盖零样本文本到语音、语音转换、目标说话人提取、语音增强和唇语到语音五个任务，均声称性能优于已有最优系统；但摘要未提供具体指标、对比对象或实验设置细节，可核验性有限。
chinese_summary.limitations: 掩码生成模型在语音生成中的具体架构（如是否采用非自回归生成）、目标说话人提取任务中的条件机制（如何提供说话人参考信号）未知；预训练数据域的泛化能力未讨论；生成式TSE与传统基于掩码的分离思路差异较大，可能不适用于某些分离场景。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 命中关键词'target speaker extraction'和'speaker extraction'，论文将其作为下游任务之一并取得声称的SOTA，但核心贡献在于生成式预训练框架，并非针对语音分离或提取的设计，且未涉及掩码、双路径网络等用户关注的方法。建议人工复核以确认生成式TSE是否契合研究方向。

papers.title: TS-SEP: Joint Diarization and Separation Conditioned on Estimated Speaker Embeddings
papers.summary: Since diarization and source separation of meeting data are closely related tasks, we here propose an approach to perform the two objectives jointly. It builds upon the target-speaker voice activity detection (TS-VAD) diarization approach, which assumes that initial speaker embeddings are available. We replace the final combined speaker activity estimation network of TS-VAD with a network that produces speaker activity estimates at a time-frequency resolution. Those act as masks for source extraction, either via masking or via beamforming. The technique can be applied both for single-channel and multi-channel input and, in both cases, achieves a new state-of-the-art word error rate (WER) on the LibriCSS meeting data recognition task. We further compute speaker-aware and speaker-agnostic WERs to isolate the contribution of diarization errors to the overall WER performance.
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出联合说话人日志和分离的TS-SEP方法，基于估计的说话人嵌入实现掩码或波束形成，在LibriCSS上获得SOTA WER，高度匹配目标说话人提取方向，是近期有影响力的工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 针对会议音频中说话人分离（diarization）和源分离（separation）通常分开处理的问题，提出联合执行两项任务以提升分离和识别性能。
chinese_summary.method: 基于 TS-VAD 框架，假设已有初始说话人嵌入，将原始 TS-VAD 末端说话人活动估计网络替换为可输出时频分辨率活动估计的网络，再将其作为掩蔽或波束成形系数进行源提取，支持单通道与多通道输入。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将说话人日志和源分离进行深度联合建模，用一个网络同时输出说话人活动估计和掩蔽/波束成形系数；无需独立分离模块，直接端到端优化下游识别任务；在 LibriCSS 会议数据上取得当前最佳识别性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在 LibriCSS 会议识别任务上取得新的 SOTA 词错误率（WER），并通过计算 speaker-aware 和 speaker-agnostic WER 分析了日志错误对识别的影响。
chinese_summary.limitations: 方法依赖预先提供的说话人嵌入，嵌入质量对结果影响未阐明；仅在 LibriCSS 数据集上验证，通用性未知；联合训练的细节和计算开销未提及；作为扩展 TS-VAD 的工作，创新点侧重于架构修改而非基础分离机理。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 摘要中包含了 'source separation' 和 'masking' 关键词，与研究方向中的语音分离和掩蔽方法部分相关；其基于说话人嵌入的提取方式类似目标说话人提取，但论文重心在联合日志任务，分离技术仅为组成部分，实际分离方法的创新性需阅读全文确认，因此初步判定为低位相关。
